premiumSeo.metaDescription: كيف يعمل {tool}، ولمن، ماذا تُدخل، وكيف تقرأ النتيجة. دعم قرار التسعير ومخاطر الهامش من SectorCalc.
premiumSeo.h1: {tool}: السعر the job and protect the margin
premiumSeo.intro: يساعدك {tool} على اختبار العمل قبل الالتزام بالسعر. يحوّل تكاليفك وكمياتك ونسبك إلى قراءة واضحة للهامش والمخاطر حتى تلاحظ العوامل الخفية التي تآكل الربح وتقرر بثقة بدلاً من التخمين.
premiumSeo.howTo: أدخل {inputs} لسيناريو {sector}. يشغّل SectorCalc معادلات حتمية مُحكَمة ويُرجع {outputs}. أضف حقولًا اختيارية لتحسين العتبات والمخاطر.
premiumSeo.method: يستخدم {tool} طبقة حوكمة المعادلات في SectorCalc: مدخلات مُتحقَّقة، خط أنابيب حتمي، وفحوص عتبات. محاكاة تقنية — وليست نصيحة مالية أو قانونية أو هندسية.
premiumSeo.mistakes: أسعار قديمة، تجاهل حقول اختيارية، خلط وحدات، وقراءة النتيجة كربح مضمون — أخطاء متكررة. {pain} تحقق من المدخلات قبل قرارات العمل.
premiumSeo.problem: Most jobs lose margin long before the invoice, when الإعداد, rework, overruns, and underالسعرd line items are never added up before the quote goes out. The {tool} makes those drivers visible so they stop surprising you.
premiumSeo.help: يطبّق محرك الحساب الحتمي في SectorCalc على مدخلاتك ثم يبرز العوامل الأكثر تأثيراً على النتيجة. تحصل على قراءة منظمة يمكنك الدفاع عنها — وليس رقماً في صندوق أسود.
premiumSeo.who: Oلكلators, estimators, owners, and managers who السعر work, review bids, or need a consistent baseline across a team will get the most from the {tool}.
premiumSeo.inputs: تشمل الحقول الأساسية {inputs} ({inputCount} مدخلات إجمالاً). الحقول الإلزامية minimal؛ والاختيارية تُحسّن الحكم.

Results reflect the inputs you provide and SectorCalc's deالمدةinistic engine. Better inputs produce a sharلكل, more defensible read.
نعم. يمكن تصدير نتائج Premium كملخصات قرار مع ملخص الحساب.

items.a: Business يغطي الحاسبةات المتميزة وملخصات القرار المتميزة. Enterprise يضيف الحوكمة والحزم.

تتضمن ملخصات القرار المتميزة ملخص حساب للمراجعة الداخلية.

homeAbout.title: من نحن
homeAbout.paragraph1: غالباً ما يتسرب الربح من الشركات عبر تكاليف غير ملحوظة وليس عبر المبيعات. التسعير الخاطئ وأخطاء الحساب والهدر وفقدان الكفاءة وضعف انضباط العروض يآكل الهامش بصمت مع الوقت.
homeAbout.paragraph2: صُمم SectorCalc لجعل هذه الخسائر غير المرئية قابلة للقياس. يرفع قرارات التكلفة والعروض والكفاءة والمخاطر إلى أساس أسرع وأكثر شفافية وموثوقية.
homeAbout.beliefSubtitle: الدقة في الحساب هي أساس الأداء الموثوق.
homeAbout.highlightSecondary: وتحويل الحساب إلى دعم قرار موثوق.
homeAbout.ctaAria: اقرأ صفحة من نحن في SectorCalc

aboutPage.seoTitle: حول SectorCalc | الحساب الصناعي ودعم القرار
aboutPage.seoDescription: يساعد SectorCalc الشركات على كشف الخسائر المخفية وقياس المخاطر التشغيلية وتحويل الحسابات الصناعية إلى دعم قرار موثوق.

hero.title: نحوّل الحساب إلى قرارات يمكن الوثوق بها.
hero.lead: SectorCalc منصة عالمية للحساب الصناعي ودعم القرار تساعد الشركات على كشف الخسائر المخفية والتصرف بثقة.

why.title: لماذا وُجد SectorCalc
why.body: معظم الخسائر التشغيلية لا تظهر على الفاتورة. تختبئ في التسعير والهدر وزمن الإعداد وانخفاض الكفاءة وضعف انضباط العروض، وتآكل الهوامش بهدوء لسنوات.

what.title: ما هو SectorCalc
what.body: مجموعة مركزة من الحاسبات القطاعية وتقارير القرار تحوّل المدخلات التشغيلية الخام إلى أرقام واضحة قابلة للدفاع — ليست جدولاً إضافياً ولا ERP ثقيلاً.

problem.title: المشكلة التي نحلها
problem.body: تتخذ الفرق قرارات التكلفة والعروض والمخاطر بمعلومات ناقصة. يجعل SectorCalc غير المرئي قابلاً للقياس حتى تستند القرارات إلى أدلة لا إلى التخمين.

how.title: كيف يعمل نظامنا
how.body: تقدّم المدخلات التي تعرفها؛ يحدد النظام ما هو مطلوب ويشغّل حسابات حتمية خاضعة للحوكمة ويتحقق من كل نتيجة مقابل الثوابت والمعايير قبل عرضها.

different.title: ما يميزنا
different.body: كل نتيجة تحمل ملخص حساب شفافاً ومعايير إقليمية استرشادية وافتراضات موثقة يمكن لفريقك مراجعتها قبل اتخاذ القرار.

who.title: لمن صُمم
who.body: أصحاب الأعمال والمقدّرون وفرق الميدان والاستشاريون الذين يحتاجون إجابات سريعة وموثوقة دون فريق تسعير كامل أو برنامج مؤسسي معقد.

building.title: ما نبنيه
building.body: معيار عالمي لذكاء الحساب القطاعي يتوسع عبر الصناعات مع إبقاء كل صيغة خاضعة للحوكمة والتدقيق والثقة.

manifesto.secondary: وتحويل الحساب إلى دعم قرار موثوق.

meta.title: SectorCalc | حاسبات قطاعية للصناعة والإنتاج والأعمال

premiumSchemaPage.legalAnswer: لا. حاسبات SectorCalc المميزة أدوات دعم قرار بافتراضات شفافة. لا تحل محل المشورة المالية أو القانونية أو الهندسية المهنية.

length.label: الطول
length.helper: الطول of the المساحة to be calculated. Standard SI unit. المستخدم in construction, real estate, and manufacturing for المساحة measurement.

width.label: العرض
width.helper: العرض of the المساحة to be calculated. Standard SI unit. المستخدم in construction, real estate, and manufacturing for المساحة measurement.

shape.label: Shape
shape.helper: Shape of the المساحة. Diffeإيجار shapes require diffeإيجار formulas. Common in geometry and engineering design.

radius.label: Radius
radius.helper: نصف القطر for circular shapes. Required when shape is 'circle'. Standard SI unit.

base.label: Base
base.helper: Base الطول for triangle or trapezoid. Required when shape is 'triangle' or 'trapezoid'. Standard SI unit.

height.label: الارتفاع
height.helper: الارتفاع for triangle or trapezoid. Required when shape is 'triangle' or 'trapezoid'. Standard SI unit.

topbase.label: Top Base
topbase.helper: Top base الطول for trapezoid. Required when shape is 'trapezoid'. Standard SI unit.

length.label: الطول
length.helper: الطول of the المساحة to be calculated. Standard measurement for square footage.

width.label: العرض
width.helper: العرض of the المساحة to be calculated. Standard measurement for square footage.

shape.label: Shape
shape.helper: Shape of the المساحة. Diffeإيجار formulas apply for diffeإيجار shapes.

radius.label: Radius
radius.helper: نصف القطر for circular المساحةs. Required when shape is 'circle'.

base.label: Base
base.helper: Base الطول for triangular المساحةs. Required when shape is 'triangle'.

height.label: الارتفاع
height.helper: الارتفاع for triangular المساحةs. Required when shape is 'triangle'.

length.label: الطول
length.helper: الطول of the concrete element (e.g., slab, beam). Based on structural engineering standards (ACI 318).

width.label: العرض
width.helper: العرض of the concrete element. ACI 318.

height.label: الارتفاع (السماكة)
height.helper: الارتفاع or السماكة of the concrete element. ACI 318.

shape.label: Shape
shape.helper: Cross-sectional shape of the element. For circular, القطر is المستخدم; for custom, additional inputs may be needed.

quantity.label: Number of identical elements
quantity.helper: Count of identical concrete elements to calculate total الحجم.

wastefactor.label: الهدر Factor
wastefactor.helper: Additional concrete allowance for الهدر, spillage, and over-excavation. Typical range 5-10% لكل ACI 304R.

unitcost.label: Concrete Unit التكلفة
unitcost.helper: التكلفة لكل cubic meter of concrete mix. Varies by region and mix design.

projectvolume.label: Project الحجم
projectvolume.helper: Total الحجم of concrete needed for the project. Based on ASTM C94 standard for ready-mixed concrete.

bagsize.label: Bag Size
bagsize.helper: Standard bag sizes available in the market. Common sizes لكل EN 197-1.

mixratio.label: Mix Ratio (cement:sand:aggregate)
mixratio.helper: Standard concrete mix ratios لكل ACI 211.1. 1:2:4 is common for general use.

wastefactor.label: الهدر Factor
wastefactor.helper: Expected المادة الهدر due to spillage, over-excavation, etc. Typical range 5-10% لكل industry practice.

cementdensity.label: Cement الكثافة
cementdensity.helper: Bulk الكثافة of cement. Typically 1440 kg/m³ لكل ASTM C188.

sanddensity.label: Sand الكثافة
sanddensity.helper: Bulk الكثافة of sand. Typically 1600 kg/m³ لكل ASTM C29.

aggregatedensity.label: Aggregate الكثافة
aggregatedensity.helper: Bulk الكثافة of coarse aggregate. Typically 1500 kg/m³ لكل ASTM C29.

watercementratio.label: Water-Cement Ratio
watercementratio.helper: Water to cement ratio by الوزن. Affects strength and workability. لكل ACI 318, typical 0.4-0.6.

bagcost.label: التكلفة لكل Bag
bagcost.helper: Unit التكلفة of one bag of cement. Market السعر varies.

sandcost.label: Sand التكلفة لكل Tonne
sandcost.helper: التكلفة of sand لكل metric tonne. Local market السعر.

aggregatecost.label: Aggregate التكلفة لكل Tonne
aggregatecost.helper: التكلفة of coarse aggregate لكل metric tonne. Local market السعر.

watercost.label: Water التكلفة لكل m³
watercost.helper: التكلفة of water لكل cubic meter. Utility المعدل.

laborrate.label: Labor المعدل لكل Hour
laborrate.helper: Hourly wage for construction labor. Varies by region.

laborhoursperm3.label: Labor الساعات لكل m³
laborhoursperm3.helper: Estimated Labor الساعات required to mix and place one cubic meter of concrete. Based on industry benchmarks.

equipmentcost.label: Equipment التكلفة لكل m³
equipmentcost.helper: التكلفة of mixer, vibrator, etc. لكل m³. Includes depreciation and الوقود.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level in input data accuracy. المستخدم for risk adjustment.

paintvolume.label: Paint الحجم
paintvolume.helper: Total الحجم of paint to be المستخدم. Based on manufacturer specifications and ASTM D2697.

coveragerate.label: Coverage المعدل
coveragerate.helper: Typical التغطية لكل لتر; varies by paint type and surface. Refer to ISO 8501 for surface preparation standards.

numberofcoats.label: Number of الطبقات
numberofcoats.helper: Number of الطبقات applied. Industry standard for most applications is 2 الطبقات.

surfacearea.label: Surface المساحة
surfacearea.helper: Total المساحة to be painted. Measured لكل project specifications.

wastefactor.label: الهدر Factor
wastefactor.helper: لكلcentage of paint الهدرd due to overspray, spillage, etc. Typical range 5-15% based on Lean manufacturing principles.

painttype.label: Paint Type
painttype.helper: Type of paint affects coverage المعدل and application method. Refer to ASTM D5146 for paint testing.

surfacecondition.label: Surface Condition
surfacecondition.helper: Surface texture impacts paint absorption and coverage. Based on ISO 8501 surface preparation grades.

applicationmethod.label: Application Method
applicationmethod.helper: Method affects transfer efficiency and الهدر. Spray has higher الهدر; brush/roller more efficient.

roomlength.label: Room الطول
roomlength.helper: الطول of the room to be floored. Standard architectural measurement لكل ISO 9001.

roomwidth.label: Room العرض
roomwidth.helper: العرض of the room. المستخدم to calculate المساحة.

flooringunitcost.label: Flooring Unit التكلفة
flooringunitcost.helper: التكلفة لكل square meter of flooring المادة. Market السعر based on supplier quotes.

wastefactor.label: الهدر Factor
wastefactor.helper: لكلcentage of المادة الهدر due to cutting and fitting. Industry standard 5-15% لكل Lean construction practices.

laborcostperhour.label: Labor التكلفة لكل Hour
laborcostperhour.helper: Hourly wage for flooring installers. Based on local Labor المعدلs.

installationtimepersqm.label: Installation Time لكل m²
installationtimepersqm.helper: Time required to install one square meter of flooring. Industry benchmark from RSMeans.

additionalcosts.label: Additional التكلفةs
additionalcosts.helper: Miscellaneous التكلفةs like adhesive, underlayment, or disposal fees.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level in input data accuracy. المستخدم for risk adjustment لكل Six Sigma DMAIC.

rooflength.label: Roof الطول
rooflength.helper: الطول of the roof along the ridge. Based on standard architectural measurements.

roofwidth.label: Roof العرض
roofwidth.helper: العرض of the roof from eave to eave. Standard dimension for rectangular roofs.

roofpitch.label: Roof Pitch (rise/run)
roofpitch.helper: Slope of the roof expressed as rise over run. Common القيمةs: 0.5 (6/12), 1.0 (12/12).

overhang.label: Eave Overhang
overhang.helper: Extra الطول extending beyond the walls for water runoff. Typical 0.3-0.6 m.

wastefactor.label: الهدر Factor
wastefactor.helper: لكلcentage of المادة الهدر due to cutting and overlap. Industry standard 5-15%.

rooftype.label: Roof Type
rooftype.helper: Architectural style affecting المساحة calculation. Gable: simple triangle ends; Hip: slopes on all sides.

riserheight.label: Riser الارتفاع
riserheight.helper: Building codes (e.g., IBC, Eurocode) specify Riser الارتفاع between 100-220 mm for safety and comfort.

treaddepth.label: Tread العمق
treaddepth.helper: Building codes require Tread العمق typically 200-400 mm to ensure adequate foot space.

numberofsteps.label: Number of Steps
numberofsteps.helper: Total steps in the stair flight; deالمدةined by floor الارتفاع and Riser الارتفاع.

stairwidth.label: Stair العرض
stairwidth.helper: Minimum العرض لكل building codes (e.g., 800 mm for residential, 1000 mm for commercial).

materialtype.label: المادة Type
materialtype.helper: المادة affects structural design, التكلفة, and durability. Standards: ACI 318 for concrete, AISC for steel.

unitcostmaterial.label: Unit التكلفة of المادة
unitcostmaterial.helper: التكلفة لكل cubic meter of chosen المادة; varies by region and quality.

laborrate.label: Labor المعدل
laborrate.helper: Hourly wage for construction labor; includes overhead.

laborhoursperstep.label: Labor الساعات لكل Step
laborhoursperstep.helper: Estimated labor time to construct one step; based on industry benchmarks.

wastefactor.label: الهدر Factor
wastefactor.helper: لكلcentage of المادة الهدر due to cutting, errors; typical 5-10%.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level in input data; المستخدم for risk-adjusted outputs.

walllength.label: Wall الطول
walllength.helper: Total الطول of wall to be covered. Standard construction practice (ASTM C840).

wallheight.label: Wall الارتفاع
wallheight.helper: الارتفاع of wall. Typical residential ارتفاع السقف 8-10 ft.

sheetwidth.label: Sheet العرض
sheetwidth.helper: Standard drywall sheet العرض. Common sizes: 4 ft (ASTM C1396).

sheetlength.label: Sheet الطول
sheetlength.helper: Standard drywall Sheet الطول. Common sizes: 8, 10, 12 ft.

wastefactor.label: الهدر Factor
wastefactor.helper: لكلcentage of المادة الهدر due to cuts and errors. Industry standard 5-15% (RSMeans).

laborrate.label: Labor المعدل
laborrate.helper: Hourly wage for drywall installers. Varies by region (BLS data).

materialcostpersheet.label: المادة التكلفة لكل Sheet
materialcostpersheet.helper: التكلفة لكل drywall sheet. Depends on السماكة, type (e.g., moisture resistant).

laborproductivity.label: Labor Productivity
laborproductivity.helper: Number of sheets installed لكل hour لكل worker. Typical 1-3 sheets/hr (RSMeans).

numworkers.label: Number of Workers
numworkers.helper: Crew size for installation. Typically 2-3 workers.

walllength.label: Wall الطول
walllength.helper: الطول of the wall to be built. Standard construction practice.

wallheight.label: Wall الارتفاع
wallheight.helper: الارتفاع of the wall. Standard construction practice.

bricklength.label: Brick الطول
bricklength.helper: الطول of a single brick. Common brick size لكل ISO 9001.

brickheight.label: Brick الارتفاع
brickheight.helper: الارتفاع of a single brick. Common brick size لكل ISO 9001.

brickdepth.label: Brick العمق
brickdepth.helper: العمق of a single brick. Common brick size لكل ISO 9001.

mortarthickness.label: Mortar السماكة
mortarthickness.helper: السماكة of mortar joints. Standard construction practice لكل ASTM C270.

wastefactor.label: الهدر Factor
wastefactor.helper: لكلcentage of bricks الهدرd due to breakage or cutting. Industry standard 5-10%.

bondtype.label: Bond Type
bondtype.helper: Type of brick bond pattern. Affects brick count لكل المساحة. Common masonry standards.

quantity.label: Number of Rebars
quantity.helper: Total number of identical rebars to calculate Total الوزن.

diameter.label: Rebar القطر
diameter.helper: Standard rebar القطرs لكل ASTM A615/A615M. Common sizes: 6, 8, 10, 12, 14, 16, 18, 20, 22, 25, 28, 32, 36, 40, 50 mm.

length.label: Reطول القضيب
length.helper: الطول of rebar piece. Typical stock الطولs: 6m, 12m, 18m. User can input custom الطول.

steeldensity.label: Steel الكثافة
steeldensity.helper: الكثافة of steel. Standard القيمة 7850 kg/m³ لكل ASTM A36. Variations for diffeإيجار steel grades.

unitsystem.label: Unit System
unitsystem.helper: Select unit system. Metric uses mm, m, kg. Imلكلial uses inch, ft, lb. Conversion factors applied.

length.label: Excavation الطول
length.helper: الطول of excavation المساحة. Based on civil engineering standards (e.g., ASTM D3740).

width.label: Excavation العرض
width.helper: العرض of excavation المساحة. Common in earthwork calculations.

depth.label: Excavation العمق
depth.helper: العمق of excavation. Critical for الحجم and stability analysis.

slopeangle.label: Slope Angle
slopeangle.helper: Angle of excavation sides for safety and الحجم adjustment. OSHA standards recommend max 34° for Type A soil.

soiltype.label: Soil Type
soiltype.helper: Soil classification لكل OSHA 29 CFR 1926 Subpart P. Affects slope requirements and الحجم.

swellfactor.helper: لكلcentage increase in الحجم after excavation due to soil loosening. Typical القيمةs: 20-30% for common earth.

compactionfactor.label: Compaction Factor
compactionfactor.helper: لكلcentage of original الكثافة achieved after compaction. ASTM D698 standard.

walllength.label: Wall الطول
walllength.helper: الطول of the wall to be plastered. Standard construction measurement.

wallheight.label: Wall الارتفاع
wallheight.helper: الارتفاع of the wall. Standard construction measurement.

plasterthickness.label: Plaster السماكة
plasterthickness.helper: السماكة of plaster layer. Typical range 10-20 mm for internal walls.

mixratio.label: Mix Ratio (Cement:Sand)
mixratio.helper: Cement to sand ratio by الحجم. Common ratios: 1:4 for internal plaster, 1:3 for external.

cementdensity.label: Cement الكثافة
cementdensity.helper: Bulk الكثافة of cement. Typically 1440 kg/m³ لكل IS 875.

sanddensity.label: Sand الكثافة
sanddensity.helper: Bulk الكثافة of sand. Typically 1600 kg/m³.

wastagefactor.label: Wastage Factor
wastagefactor.helper: لكلcentage allowance for المادة wastage during mixing and application. Industry standard 5-10%.

laborrate.label: Labor المعدل
laborrate.helper: التكلفة of labor لكل square meter of plastering. Varies by region.

cementprice.label: Cement السعر
cementprice.helper: السعر لكل bag of cement (typically 50 kg).

sandprice.label: Sand السعر
sandprice.helper: السعر لكل cubic meter of sand.

roomlength.label: Room الطول (m)
roomlength.helper: Physical dimension of the room. Standard construction practice (ISO 1000).

roomwidth.label: Room العرض (m)
roomwidth.helper: Physical dimension of the room. Standard construction practice (ISO 1000).

flooringtype.label: Flooring Type
flooringtype.helper: المادة selection affects التكلفة and الهدر factor. Industry standards (ASTM F1869 for moisture, etc.).

wastefactor.label: الهدر Factor (%)
wastefactor.helper: Typical الهدر factor for flooring installation: 5-15% depending on pattern and room shape. Lean construction principles recommend minimizing الهدر.

materialcostperm2.label: المادة التكلفة لكل م² (currency)
materialcostperm2.helper: Market السعر for selected flooring type. Sourced from local suppliers or RSMeans التكلفة data.

laborcostperm2.label: Labor التكلفة لكل م² (currency)
laborcostperm2.helper: Installation Labor المعدل. Varies by region and complexity. Industry benchmarks from BLS or RSMeans.

additionalcosts.label: Additional التكلفةs (currency)
additionalcosts.helper: Miscellaneous التكلفةs: underlayment, adhesive, removal of old flooring, etc.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence (0-1)
dataconfidence.helper: User's confidence in input data accuracy. المستخدم for risk adjustment. Common in project management (PMBOK).

loanamount.label: Loan Amount
loanamount.helper: رأس المال amount borrowed. Standard financial practice لكل GAAP.

annualinterestrate.label: Annual Interest المعدل
annualinterestrate.helper: Annual nominal interest المعدل. Based on market المعدلs and lender المدةs.

loantermmonths.label: Loan المدة (Months)
loantermmonths.helper: المدة of loan in months. Common المدةs: 12, 24, 36, 48, 60, 120, 240, 360.

paymentfrequency.label: Payment Frequency
paymentfrequency.helper: How often payments are made. Affects compounding and total interest.

extrapayment.label: Extra Payment لكل لكلiod
extrapayment.helper: Additional رأس المال payment each لكلiod to reduce loan المدة and interest.

compoundfrequency.label: Compounding Frequency
compoundfrequency.helper: How often interest is compounded. Affects effective interest المعدل.

homeprice.label: Home السعر
homeprice.helper: Purchase السعر of the proلكلty. Standard real estate valuation.

downpayment.label: Down Payment
downpayment.helper: Initial upfront payment. Typically 20% to avoid PMI.

loanterm.label: Loan المدة
loanterm.helper: المدة of the loan. Common المدةs: 15, 20, 30 السنوات.

propertytaxrate.label: Annual Proلكلty Tax المعدل
propertytaxrate.helper: لكلcentage of home القيمة paid annually in proلكلty taxes.

homeinsurancerate.label: Annual Home Insurance المعدل
homeinsurancerate.helper: لكلcentage of home القيمة paid annually for insurance.

pmirate.label: PMI المعدل (if down payment < 20%)
pmirate.helper: Private mortgage insurance المعدل if down payment < 20%.

annualincome.label: Annual Gross Income
annualincome.helper: Borrower's annual income for debt-to-income ratio.

monthlydebts.label: Other Monthly Debt Payments
monthlydebts.helper: Existing monthly debt obligations (car loans, student loans, etc.).

principal.label: رأس المال Amount
principal.helper: Initial amount of money borrowed or invested. Standard financial practice.

annualinterestrate.label: Annual Interest المعدل
annualinterestrate.helper: Yearly interest المعدل as a لكلcentage. Common in loan and investment calculations.

timeperiod.label: Time لكلiod
timeperiod.helper: المدة for which interest is calculated. Typically in السنوات.

compoundingfrequency.label: Compounding Frequency
compoundingfrequency.helper: How often interest is compounded. Affects total interest earned/paid.

interesttype.label: Interest Type
interesttype.helper: Simple interest is linear; compound interest grows exponentially.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level in input data. المستخدم for risk-adjusted outputs.

principal.label: رأس المال Amount
principal.helper: Initial investment or loan amount. Standard financial practice.

annualinterestrate.label: Annual Interest المعدل (%)
annualinterestrate.helper: Nominal annual interest المعدل. Based on market المعدلs or contract المدةs.

compoundingfrequency.label: Compounding Frequency
compoundingfrequency.helper: Number of compounding لكلiods لكل year. Common القيمةs: annually (1), semi-annually (2), quarterly (4), monthly (12), daily (365), or continuous.

timeperiod.label: Time لكلiod
timeperiod.helper: المدة of investment or loan in السنوات. Standard financial planning horizon.

additionalcontribution.label: Additional Contribution لكل لكلiod
additionalcontribution.helper: Regular contribution added each compounding لكلiod. Common in savings plans.

contributiontiming.label: Contribution Timing
contributiontiming.helper: Whether contributions are made at the beginning or end of each لكلiod. Affects Future القيمة calculation.

originalprice.label: Original السعر
originalprice.helper: The initial السعر before any discount. Standard pricing practice لكل ISO 9001:2015 clause 7.1.5 (monitoring and measuring resources).

discountpercent.label: Discount لكلcentage
discountpercent.helper: لكلcentage reduction applied to Original السعر. Common in retail and B2B pricing stالمعدلgies; referenced in financial accounting standards (IFRS 15).

quantity.label: الكمية
quantity.helper: Number of items purchased. الحجم discounts are typical in supply chain management (APICS/SCOR model).

taxrate.label: Tax المعدل
taxrate.helper: Sales tax or VAT applicable. Based on local tax regulations; ISO 14000 may apply for environmental taxes.

additionaldiscount.label: Additional Discount
additionaldiscount.helper: Fixed additional discount (e.g., coupon). Common in promotional campaigns; referenced in marketing ROI analysis.

currency.label: Currency
currency.helper: Currency for moصافيary القيمةs. ISO 4217 currency codes standard.

value.label: القيمة
value.helper: The base القيمة for لكلcentage calculation. Typically represents a الكمية or amount.

percentage.label: لكلcentage
percentage.helper: The لكلcentage to apply to the القيمة. Standard لكلcentage range 0-100.

mode.label: Calculation Mode
mode.helper: Select the type of لكلcentage calculation: لكلcentageOf (X% of Y), لكلcentageChange (increase/decrease from base), القيمةFromلكلcentage (find base from لكلcentage and result).

basevalue.label: Base القيمة
basevalue.helper: The base القيمة for لكلcentage change calculations. Required when mode is 'لكلcentageChange'.

resultvalue.label: Result القيمة
resultvalue.helper: The resulting القيمة for القيمةFromلكلcentage mode. Required when mode is 'القيمةFromلكلcentage'.

revenue.label: Total Revenue
revenue.helper: Total sales revenue from goods or services. Based on standard financial reporting (GAAP/IFRS).

cogs.label: التكلفة of Goods Sold (COGS)
cogs.helper: Direct التكلفةs attributable to production. Includes المادةs, labor, overhead. لكل standard التكلفة accounting (IMA).

operatingexpenses.label: Oلكلating Expenses
operatingexpenses.helper: SG&A, R&D, depreciation, etc. Excludes interest and taxes. Based on income statement structure.

otherincome.label: Other Income
otherincome.helper: Non-oلكلating income (e.g., interest, gains). Included for صافي profit margin.

taxrate.label: Effective Tax المعدل
taxrate.helper: Effective corpoالمعدل tax المعدل. Based on jurisdiction (OECD average ~25%).

interestexpense.label: Interest Expense
interestexpense.helper: التكلفة of debt financing. المستخدم to compute صافي profit margin.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level
dataconfidence.helper: Subjective confidence in input data accuracy. Adjusts output reliability. Based on risk management practices (ISO 31000).

fixedcosts.label: Fixed التكلفةs
fixedcosts.helper: Total Fixed التكلفةs (e.g., إيجار, salaries, insurance) لكل لكلiod. Based on التكلفة accounting standards (e.g., GAAP, IFRS).

variablecostperunit.label: Variable التكلفة لكل unit
variablecostperunit.helper: التكلفة that varies with production الحجم (e.g., المادةs, labor). Standard in managerial accounting.

sellingpriceperunit.label: Selling السعر لكل unit
sellingpriceperunit.helper: Revenue لكل unit sold. Must exceed Variable التكلفة for positive contribution margin.

timeperiod.label: Time لكلiod
timeperiod.helper: لكلiod for which Fixed التكلفةs are defined. Aligns with financial reporting لكلiods.

targetprofit.label: الهدف Profit
targetprofit.helper: Desired profit above break-even. المستخدم for الهدف الحجم calculations.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level in input data (e.g., based on historical accuracy). Adjusts results for uncertainty.

initialinvestment.label: Initial Investment
initialinvestment.helper: Total upfront التكلفة including equipment, installation, and training. Based on capital budgeting standards (NPV, IRR).

annualnetcashinflow.label: Annual صافي Cash Inالتدفق
annualnetcashinflow.helper: Expected annual incremental cash inالتدفقs minus outالتدفقs from the investment. Based on discounted cash التدفق analysis.

projectlifetime.label: Project Lifetime
projectlifetime.helper: Expected العمر الإنتاجي of the investment. Typical range 1-50 السنوات based on asset depreciation standards (MACRS).

discountrate.label: Discount المعدل
discountrate.helper: التكلفة of capital or required المعدل of return. Based on CAPM or WACC standards.

salvagevalue.label: قيمة الخردة
salvagevalue.helper: Estimated residual القيمة At end of project lifetime. Based on asset depreciation methods.

annualoperatingcost.label: Annual Oلكلating التكلفة
annualoperatingcost.helper: Recurring التكلفةs such as maintenance, labor, الطاقة. Based on life cycle التكلفةing (ISO 15686).

annualrevenueincrease.label: Annual Revenue Increase
annualrevenueincrease.helper: Expected additional revenue from the investment. Based on market analysis and forecasting.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level
dataconfidence.helper: Subjective confidence in input data accuracy. المستخدم for risk-adjusted ROI. Based on sensitivity analysis standards.

annualsalary.label: Annual Salary (Gross)
annualsalary.helper: Base annual gross salary لكل employee. Standard HR metric.

bonuspercentage.label: Bonus لكلcentage
bonuspercentage.helper: Annual bonus as لكلcentage of salary. Common in compensation packages.

employertaxrate.label: Employer Tax المعدل (Social Security, etc.)
employertaxrate.placeholder: أدخل Employer Tax المعدل (Social Security, etc.)
employertaxrate.helper: Employer-paid taxes (e.g., Social Security, Medicare in US). Varies by country.

benefitscost.label: Benefits التكلفة لكل Employee لكل Year
benefitscost.placeholder: أدخل Benefits التكلفة لكل Employee لكل Year
benefitscost.helper: Health insurance, retirement contributions, etc. Industry benchmark: ~30% of salary.

overheadrate.label: Overhead المعدل (Facilities, IT, etc.)
overheadrate.helper: Indirect التكلفةs allocated لكل employee. Common in التكلفة accounting.

workingdaysperyear.label: Working الأيام لكل Year
workingdaysperyear.helper: Standard working الأيام (excluding weekends and holiالأيام). Typical: 260.

hoursperday.label: الساعات لكل Day
hoursperday.helper: Standard working الساعات لكل day. Typical: 8.

productiveutilization.label: Productive Utilization المعدل
productiveutilization.helper: لكلcentage of paid time spent on productive work. Lean metric; typical 70-85%.

annualsalary.label: Annual Salary
annualsalary.helper: Base annual salary of the employee. Standard compensation practice.

benefitspercent.label: Benefits لكلcentage
benefitspercent.helper: لكلcentage of salary for benefits (health, retirement, etc.). Typical range 25-35%.

overheadpercent.label: Overhead لكلcentage
overheadpercent.helper: Indirect التكلفةs (facilities, equipment, admin). Industry benchmark 40-60%.

profitmarginpercent.label: Profit Margin لكلcentage
profitmarginpercent.helper: Desired profit margin on labor. Typical 10-30%.

paidhoursperyear.label: Paid الساعات لكل Year
paidhoursperyear.helper: Total paid الساعات (40 hrs/week * 52 weeks). Standard full-time.

billablehoursperyear.label: ساعات قابلة للفوترة لكل Year
billablehoursperyear.placeholder: أدخل ساعات قابلة للفوترة لكل Year
billablehoursperyear.helper: الساعات actually billed to clients. Typically 85-90% of paid الساعات.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence in input data accuracy. Affects adjustment factor.

assetcost.label: Asset التكلفة
assetcost.helper: Initial التكلفة of the asset. Based on accounting standards (IAS 16, GAAP).

salvagevalue.label: قيمة الخردة
salvagevalue.helper: Estimated residual القيمة At end of العمر الإنتاجي. لكل IAS 16.

usefullife.label: العمر الإنتاجي
usefullife.helper: Expected oلكلational life. Industry standards vary; typical range 3-30 السنوات.

depreciationmethod.label: Depreciation Method
depreciationmethod.helper: Common methods لكل GAAP and IFRS. Straight-line is simplest; declining-balance acceleالمعدلs expense.

decliningbalancefactor.label: Declining Balance Factor
decliningbalancefactor.helper: Factor for declining balance method (e.g., 2 for double-declining). Typical القيمةs: 1.5, 2, 2.5.

productionunits.label: Total Production Units
productionunits.helper: Estimated total units to be produced over life. المستخدم in units-of-production method.

unitsproducedthisyear.label: Units Produced This Year
unitsproducedthisyear.helper: Actual units produced in التيار لكلiod for units-of-production method.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level in input data (0-100%). المستخدم for adjusted output.

accountsreceivable.label: Accounts Receivable (Alacaklar)
accountsreceivable.helper: Average accounts receivable balance. Based on standard financial statement analysis (GAAP/IFRS).

accountspayable.label: Accounts Payable (Borçlar)
accountspayable.helper: Average accounts payable balance. Standard financial metric.

inventory.label: Inventory (Stok)
inventory.helper: Average inventory القيمة. Based on supply chain management principles (APICS).

costofgoodssold.label: التكلفة of Goods Sold (COGS)
costofgoodssold.helper: Annual التكلفة of goods sold. Standard income statement item.

netsales.label: صافي Sales (صافي Satışlar)
netsales.helper: Annual صافي sales revenue. Standard income statement item.

operatingexpenses.label: Oلكلating Expenses (Faaliyet Giderleri)
operatingexpenses.helper: Annual oلكلating expenses excluding COGS. Standard financial metric.

daysinperiod.label: الأيام in لكلiod (Dönem Günü)
daysinperiod.helper: Number of الأيام in the analysis لكلiod. Typically 365 for annual.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence (Veri Güveni)
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level in input data quality. المستخدم for adjusted outputs.

availabletimeperday.label: Available Time لكل Day (الساعات)
availabletimeperday.helper: Total time machine is available لكل day, including planned downtime. Based on OEE (الفعالية الإجمالية للمعدات) standard.

planneddowntimeperday.label: Planned Downtime لكل Day (الساعات)
planneddowntimeperday.helper: Scheduled maintenance, breaks, etc. ISO 22400 for manufacturing oلكلations management.

unplanneddowntimeperday.label: Unplanned Downtime لكل Day (الساعات)
unplanneddowntimeperday.helper: Breakdowns, الإعداد, adjustments. Lean manufacturing focus on reducing unplanned downtime.

operatingspeed.label: Oلكلating Speed (units لكل hour)
operatingspeed.helper: Actual production speed. Compared to ideal speed for الأداء calculation.

idealspeed.label: Ideal Speed (units لكل hour)
idealspeed.helper: Theoretical maximum speed. المستخدم for الأداء metric in OEE.

defectrate.label: Defect المعدل (fraction)
defectrate.helper: Proportion of defective units. Quality metric in Six Sigma.

hourlycost.label: Hourly التكلفة (currency لكل hour)
hourlycost.helper: Machine oلكلating التكلفة including labor, الطاقة, maintenance. المستخدم for التكلفة analysis.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence (0-1)
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence in input data accuracy. Adjusts final output for risk.

cuttinglength.label: Cutting الطول
cuttinglength.helper: Total الطول of المادة to be cut along the tool path. Based on ISO 8688-1 tool life testing standards.

feedrate.label: Feed المعدل
feedrate.helper: Linear feed speed of the cutting tool. Typical القيمةs from machinery handbook (e.g., 0.1-0.5 mm/rev for steel).

spindlespeed.label: Spindle Speed
spindlespeed.helper: Rotational speed of the spindle. Deالمدةines cutting speed; standard ranges لكل المادة (e.g., 2000-6000 RPM for aluminum).

numberofpasses.label: Number of Passes
numberofpasses.helper: Number of cutting passes required to achieve final dimension. Based on العمق of cut and المادة removal المعدل.

rapidtraverserate.label: Rapid Traverse المعدل
rapidtraverserate.helper: Maximum speed for non-cutting movements (tool positioning). Typical machine specs: 10-30 m/min.

rapiddistance.label: Rapid Traverse المسافة
rapiddistance.helper: Total المسافة traveled during rapid moves لكل cycle. Includes approach and retract.

toolchangetime.label: Tool Change Time
toolchangetime.helper: Time to change a tool. Typical automatic tool changer: 2-10 sec.

numberoftoolchanges.label: Number of Tool Changes
numberoftoolchanges.helper: Number of tool changes لكل cycle. Based on oلكلation sequence.

loadingunloadingtime.label: Loading/Unloading Time
loadingunloadingtime.helper: Time to load and unload workpiece. Manual: 20-60 sec; automated: 5-15 sec.

idletime.label: Idle Time لكل Cycle
idletime.helper: Non-productive time لكل cycle (e.g., dwell, inspection). Lean manufacturing focus on reducing idle time.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence in input data accuracy. Low: ±20% uncertainty; Medium: ±10%; High: ±5%. Based on Six Sigma data quality assessment.

laborrate.label: Labor المعدل
laborrate.helper: Hourly welder المعدل

materialtype.label: المادة Type
materialtype.helper: المادة type affects cutting speed and القدرة requirements. Based on laser cutting industry standards (e.g., Trumpf, Bystronic).

materialthickness.label: المادة السماكة
materialthickness.helper: السماكة directly impacts cutting speed and time. Typical range for laser cutting: 0.5-25 mm.

cuttinglength.label: Total Cutting الطول
cuttinglength.helper: Total الطول of cuts لكل part or batch. Deالمدةines primary cutting time.

cuttingspeed.label: Cutting Speed
cuttingspeed.helper: Speed depends on المادة and السماكة. Typical القيمةs from machine manufacturer tables.

piercingtimeperpierce.label: Piercing Time لكل Pierce
piercingtimeperpierce.helper: Time to pierce the المادة at start of each cut. Varies with المادة and السماكة.

numberofpierces.label: Number of Pierces
numberofpierces.helper: Number of pierces لكل part or batch. Typically equals number of cut contours.

rapidtraversedistance.label: Rapid Traverse المسافة
rapidtraversedistance.helper: المسافة the laser head moves without cutting (positioning).

rapidtraversespeed.label: Rapid Traverse Speed
rapidtraversespeed.helper: Maximum positioning speed of the laser head. Typical: 60-120 m/min.

setuptime.label: الإعداد Time
setuptime.helper: Time for loading المادة, programming, and machine preparation.

batchsize.label: Batch Size
batchsize.helper: Number of identical parts in the batch. Affects الإعداد amortization.

laborcostperhour.label: Labor التكلفة لكل Hour
laborcostperhour.helper: Oلكلator labor التكلفة including overhead. Typical range: $20-$80/h.

machinecostperhour.label: Machine التكلفة لكل Hour
machinecostperhour.helper: Machine depreciation, maintenance, الطاقة, and مستهلكات. Typical: $30-$200/h.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: User's confidence in input data accuracy. Affects output adjustment for risk.

laborrate.label: Labor المعدل
laborrate.helper: Oلكلator المعدل

materialcostperkg.label: المادة التكلفة لكل kg
materialcostperkg.helper: التكلفة of filament or resin لكل kilogram. Typical range for PLA: $20-50, ABS: $30-60, resin: $50-150. Source: industry benchmarks.

materialdensity.label: المادة الكثافة
materialdensity.helper: الكثافة of printing المادة. PLA ~1.24 g/cm³, ABS ~1.04 g/cm³, PETG ~1.27 g/cm³. المستخدم to convert الحجم to الوزن.

partvolume.label: Part الحجم
partvolume.helper: الحجم of the printed part, typically from CAD model. Affects المادة usage and print time.

infillpercentage.label: Infill لكلcentage
infillpercentage.helper: لكلcentage of internal الحجم filled with المادة. 0% for hollow, 100% for solid. Affects المادة usage and strength.

printtimehours.label: Print Time
printtimehours.helper: Estimated print المدة. Affects machine and labor التكلفة. Typical range: 1-100 الساعات.

machinecostperhour.label: Machine التكلفة لكل Hour
machinecostperhour.helper: Depreciation, maintenance, and Electricity التكلفة لكل hour. For a $2000 printer over 2000 الساعات: $1/hour plus electricity $0.1-0.5/hour.

laborcostperhour.label: Labor التكلفة لكل Hour
laborcostperhour.helper: Oلكلator's hourly wage including overhead. Affects post-processing and monitoring time.

postprocessingtimehours.label: Post-Processing Time
postprocessingtimehours.helper: Time for support removal, sanding, painting, etc. Affects labor التكلفة.

failurerate.helper: لكلcentage of prints that fail. Affects effective التكلفة لكل successful part. Typical range: 2-20%.

batchsize.label: Batch Size
batchsize.helper: Number of identical parts printed in one run. Affects الإعداد التكلفة amortization.

setupcost.label: الإعداد التكلفة
setupcost.helper: One-time التكلفة for file preparation, bed leveling, etc. Amortized over batch size.

overheadrate.label: Overhead المعدل
overheadrate.helper: لكلcentage added to direct التكلفةs for facility, admin, etc. Typical: 15-30%.

profitmargin.label: Profit Margin
profitmargin.helper: Desired profit margin on Total التكلفة. Typical: 20-50%.

materialtype.label: المادة Type
materialtype.helper: المادة الكثافة varies; standard densities from ASM Handbook.

thickness.label: السماكة
thickness.helper: Sheet السماكة; typical range 0.1-100 mm لكل ISO 3574.

width.label: العرض
width.helper: Sheet العرض; standard العرضs up to 5000 mm.

length.label: الطول
length.helper: Sheet الطول; standard الطولs up to 12000 mm.

unitsystem.label: Unit System
unitsystem.helper: Select measurement system; metric (mm, kg) or imلكلial (in, lb).

totalmaterialinput.label: Total المادة Input
totalmaterialinput.helper: Total raw المادة entering the production process. Based on ISO 14051 المادة التدفق التكلفة accounting (MFCA) standards.

goodoutput.label: إنتاج جيد
goodoutput.helper: الكمية of product meeting quality specifications. Derived from Six Sigma yield metrics.

scraprate.label: Scrap المعدل
scraprate.helper: لكلcentage of المادة that becomes scrap during processing. Based on lean manufacturing الهدر reduction principles.

reworkrate.label: Rework المعدل
reworkrate.helper: لكلcentage of output requiring rework. Common metric in quality management (ISO 9001).

materialcostperkg.label: المادة التكلفة لكل kg
materialcostperkg.helper: Purchase التكلفة of raw المادة لكل kilogram. المستخدم for financial impact calculation.

disposalcostperkg.label: Disposal التكلفة لكل kg
disposalcostperkg.helper: التكلفة to dispose of الهدر المادة. Environmental التكلفة factor لكل ISO 14000.

productionvolume.label: Production الحجم
productionvolume.helper: Total units produced in the لكلiod. المستخدم to scale الهدر calculations.

timeperiod.label: Time لكلiod
timeperiod.helper: Time basis for calculations. Enables scaling to annual الهدر and التكلفة.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence in input data accuracy. Adjusts output reliability. Based on data quality assessment frameworks.

totalproductionquantity.label: Total Production الكمية
totalproductionquantity.helper: Total number of units produced in the لكلiod. Based on production records (ISO 9001).

scrapquantity.label: Scrap الكمية
scrapquantity.helper: Number of units scrapped due to defects or الهدر. Direct measure from quality control (Six Sigma).

reworkquantity.label: Rework الكمية
reworkquantity.helper: Units that required rework but not scrapped. Important for total الهدر analysis (Lean).

costperunit.label: التكلفة لكل unit
costperunit.helper: Average التكلفة to produce one unit including المادةs, labor, overhead. المستخدم for financial impact (Managerial Accounting).

reworkcostperunit.label: Rework التكلفة لكل unit
reworkcostperunit.helper: Additional التكلفة to rework one unit. Typically lower than original التكلفة but significant (Lean Accounting).

perioddays.label: لكلiod الأيام
perioddays.helper: Number of الأيام in the analysis لكلiod. المستخدم for المعدل normalization (standard reporting).

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Subjective confidence in data accuracy. Affects adjustment factor for outputs (risk management).

plannedproductiontime.label: Planned Production Time
plannedproductiontime.helper: Total time scheduled for production لكل shift/day. Based on ISO 22400 (KPIs for manufacturing oلكلations management).

operatingtime.label: Oلكلating Time
operatingtime.helper: Actual time the equipment is running (planned production time minus downtime). Key for التوفر calculation.

idealcycletime.label: Ideal Cycle Time
idealcycletime.helper: Theoretical minimum time to produce one unit under optimal conditions. المستخدم in الأداء calculation.

totalpartsproduced.label: Total Parts Produced
totalpartsproduced.helper: Total number of parts produced during oلكلating time. Includes both good and defective parts.

goodpartsproduced.label: Good Parts Produced
goodpartsproduced.helper: Number of parts meeting quality standards. المستخدم in Quality calculation.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level
dataconfidence.helper: Subjective assessment of data accuracy. Adjusts final OEE for uncertainty. Common in lean manufacturing assessments.

machinepurchasecost.label: Machine Purchase التكلفة
machinepurchasecost.helper: Initial capital investment for the machine. Based on standard التكلفة accounting principles (Maynard).

usefullifeyears.label: العمر الإنتاجي (السنوات)
usefullifeyears.helper: Expected oلكلational life of the machine. Typical range 5-20 السنوات لكل industry standards (ISO 15663).

salvagevalue.label: قيمة الخردة
salvagevalue.helper: Estimated resale القيمة At end of العمر الإنتاجي. Usually 5-20% of Purchase التكلفة.

annualoperatinghours.label: Annual Oلكلating الساعات
annualoperatinghours.helper: Total الساعات the machine is opeالمعدلd لكل year. Based on typical single shift (2000 hrs) or multi-shift oلكلations.

maintenancecostperyear.label: Annual Maintenance التكلفة
maintenancecostperyear.helper: Average yearly maintenance expenses including parts and labor. Typically 2-5% of Purchase التكلفة.

energyconsumptionkw.label: الطاقة الاستهلاك (kW)
energyconsumptionkw.helper: Average القدرة draw during oلكلation. Based on machine specifications (ISO 50001).

energycostperkwh.label: الطاقة التكلفة لكل kWh
energycostperkwh.helper: Local electricity المعدل. Varies by region; typical range $0.05-$0.30.

operatorlaborcostperhour.label: Oلكلator Labor التكلفة لكل Hour
operatorlaborcostperhour.placeholder: أدخل Oلكلator Labor التكلفة لكل Hour
operatorlaborcostperhour.helper: Hourly wage including benefits for machine oلكلator. Based on labor market data.

floorspacesqft.label: Floor Space Occupied (sq ft)
floorspacesqft.helper: المساحة occupied by the machine including clearance. المستخدم for space التكلفة allocation.

annualfacilitycostpersqft.label: Annual Facility التكلفة لكل sq ft
annualfacilitycostpersqft.placeholder: أدخل Annual Facility التكلفة لكل sq ft
annualfacilitycostpersqft.helper: Yearly التكلفة لكل square foot for إيجار, utilities, insurance, etc. Typical $5-$20.

otherannualcosts.label: Other Annual التكلفةs
otherannualcosts.helper: Miscellaneous التكلفةs such as مستهلكات, software licenses, etc.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level
dataconfidence.helper: User's confidence in input data accuracy. Affects adjustment factor for final المعدل.

workpiecematerial.label: Workpiece المادة
workpiecematerial.helper: المادة type deالمدةines recommended cutting speed range. Based on ISO 513 classification and machining handbooks (e.g., Machining Data Handbook, 3rd ed.).

toolmaterial.label: Tool المادة
toolmaterial.helper: Tool المادة affects cutting speed capability. Higher hardness المادةs allow higher speeds. Reference: ISO 513.

operationtype.label: Oلكلation Type
operationtype.helper: Diffeإيجار oلكلations have diffeإيجار speed recommendations. Based on SME Tool Engineering Handbook.

cuttingspeed.label: Cutting Speed
cuttingspeed.helper: Actual cutting speed المستخدم. Must be within recommended range for المادة/tool combination. Reference: ISO 3685.

tooldiameter.label: Tool القطر
tooldiameter.helper: القطر of cutting tool (for milling/drilling). Affects spindle speed calculation. Reference: ISO 3002.

spindlespeed.label: Spindle Speed
spindlespeed.helper: Rotational speed of spindle. Calculated from cutting speed and القطر. Reference: ISO 230.

feedrate.label: Feed المعدل
feedrate.helper: Feed لكل revolution. Affects surface finish and tool life. Reference: ISO 3685.

depthofcut.label: العمق of Cut
depthofcut.helper: Radial or axial العمق. Influences cutting forces and القدرة. Reference: ISO 3002.

toollife.label: Tool Life
toollife.helper: Expected tool life before replacement. المستخدم for التكلفة analysis. Reference: Taylor's tool life equation.

machinepower.label: Machine القدرة
machinepower.helper: Available spindle القدرة. Must exceed required cutting القدرة. Reference: ISO 3002.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level in input data. Adjusts output reliability. Common in risk analysis.

cuttingspeed.label: Cutting Speed (Vc)
cuttingspeed.helper: ISO 3685:1993 - Tool-life testing with single-point turning tools. Cutting speed is the relative velocity between the tool and workpiece, affecting tool life and surface finish.

spindlespeed.label: Spindle Speed (n)
spindlespeed.helper: Calculated from cutting speed and workpiece القطر. Standard machining practice لكل ISO 3002-1.

numberofteeth.label: Number of الأسنان (z)
numberofteeth.helper: Number of cutting edges on the tool. Common for milling cutters; affects feed لكل tooth.

feedpertooth.label: Feed لكل Tooth (fz)
feedpertooth.helper: ISO 3002-1:1982 - Basic quantities in cutting and grinding. Deالمدةines chip load and surface finish.

materialtype.label: المادة Type
materialtype.helper: المادة proلكلties affect recommended cutting parameters. Based on Machining Data Handbook (Metcut) and ISO 513.

operationtype.label: Oلكلation Type
operationtype.helper: Diffeإيجار oلكلations have distinct Feed المعدل formulas. Standard machining practice.

batchsize.label: Batch Size (units)
batchsize.helper: Total number of units started in the batch. Based on production planning standards (APICS).

goodunits.label: وحدات جيدة Output
goodunits.helper: Units meeting quality specifications. ISO 9001 quality metrics.

reworkunits.label: Rework Units
reworkunits.helper: Units that can be reworked to meet specs. Lean Six Sigma DMAIC.

scrapunits.label: Scrap Units
scrapunits.helper: Units that are scrapped. الهدر reduction metrics (Lean).

costperunit.label: التكلفة لكل unit ($)
costperunit.helper: Standard التكلفة لكل unit including المادةs and labor. Managerial accounting.

reworkcostperunit.label: Rework التكلفة لكل unit ($)
reworkcostperunit.helper: Additional التكلفة to rework a unit. التكلفة of quality (COQ) analysis.

sellingpriceperunit.label: Selling السعر لكل unit ($)
sellingpriceperunit.helper: Revenue لكل good unit sold. Pricing stالمعدلgy.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level
dataconfidence.helper: Subjective confidence in input data accuracy. المستخدم for risk adjustment.

powerconsumption.label: القدرة الاستهلاك
powerconsumption.helper: Average القدرة الاستهلاك of equipment in kilowatts. Based on ISO 50001 الطاقة management standards.

operatinghours.label: Oلكلating الساعات
operatinghours.helper: Total oلكلating الساعات لكل billing لكلiod. Typically monthly or annually.

electricityrate.label: Electricity المعدل
electricityrate.helper: التكلفة لكل kilowatt-hour from utility bill. Varies by region and tariff.

demandcharge.label: Demand Charge
demandcharge.helper: Peak demand charge لكل kW. Common in industrial tariffs.

peakdemand.label: Peak Demand
peakdemand.helper: Maximum القدرة demand during billing لكلiod. المستخدم for demand charge calculation.

timeperiod.label: Time لكلiod
timeperiod.helper: Billing لكلiod for التكلفة calculation. Common in utility billing cycles.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level in input data. المستخدم for risk-adjusted التكلفة estimates.

monthlyconsumption.label: Monthly الاستهلاك
monthlyconsumption.helper: Total electricity الاستهلاك لكل month in kilowatt-الساعات. Based on utility billing data.

tariffrate.label: Tariff المعدل
tariffrate.helper: السعر لكل kWh charged by utility. Varies by region and provider.

peakconsumption.label: Peak الاستهلاك
peakconsumption.helper: الاستهلاك during peak الساعات if time-of-use pricing applies.

taxrate.label: Tax المعدل
taxrate.helper: Applicable tax لكلcentage on فاتورة الكهرباء.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level in input data accuracy.

energyconsumed.label: الطاقة Consumed
energyconsumed.helper: Total الطاقة consumed in kilowatt-الساعات over the measurement لكلiod. Based on ISO 50001 الطاقة management standard.

productionoutput.label: Production Output
productionoutput.helper: Total units produced in the same لكلiod. المستخدم to calculate الطاقة intensity لكل unit.

operatinghours.label: Oلكلating الساعات
operatinghours.helper: Total oلكلating الساعات of the facility or equipment during the measurement لكلiod.

energycostperkwh.label: الطاقة التكلفة لكل kWh
energycostperkwh.helper: Average التكلفة of الطاقة لكل kilowatt-hour. المستخدم to calculate total الطاقة التكلفة.

baselineenergyintensity.label: Baseline الطاقة Intensity
baselineenergyintensity.helper: Industry benchmark or historical baseline الطاقة intensity for comparison. Based on ISO 50001 الطاقة الأداء indicators.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence in the accuracy of input data. Affects adjustment of results. Low confidence reduces reliability.

activitytype.label: Activity Type
activitytype.helper: ISO 14064-1:2018 greenhouse gas accounting; EPA emission factors.

quantity.label: الكمية
quantity.helper: Amount of activity (e.g., kWh for electricity, gallons for الوقود, miles for travel).

unit.label: Unit
unit.helper: Unit matching the activity type; conversion factors from IPCC guidelines.

emissionfactor.label: Emission Factor (kg CO2e لكل unit)
emissionfactor.placeholder: أدخل Emission Factor (kg CO2e لكل unit)
emissionfactor.helper: Default factors from EPA eGRID or DEFRA; user can override for specific region.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Uncertainty adjustment لكل ISO 14064-3:2019; low confidence increases uncertainty margin.

includeoffset.label: Include Offsets
includeoffset.helper: If true, subtract purchased offsets from total emissions.

fueltype.label: الوقود Type
fueltype.helper: الوقود type deالمدةines emission factors لكل ISO 14064 and IPCC guidelines.

fuelconsumption.label: الوقود الاستهلاك
fuelconsumption.helper: Total الوقود consumed in liters. Source: oلكلational records.

emissionfactor.label: Emission Factor
emissionfactor.helper: CO2 equivalent لكل liter. Default for diesel لكل IPCC 2006. For other الوقودs, user can override.

operatinghours.label: Oلكلating الساعات
operatinghours.helper: الساعات of oلكلation لكل day. المستخدم for time-based calculations.

daysperyear.label: الأيام لكل Year
daysperyear.helper: Annual oلكلating الأيام. Standard industrial assumption.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level in input data. Affects adjustment factor لكل ISO 14064 uncertainty guidance.

panelcapacity.label: Panel Capacity (STC)
panelcapacity.helper: Standard Test Condition (STC) rating لكل panel. Based on IEC 61215 standard.

irradiance.label: Average Daily Irradiance
irradiance.helper: Peak Sun الساعات (PSH) based on location. Source: NASA SSE or NREL PVWatts.

systemlosses.label: System Losses
systemlosses.helper: Includes wiring, inverter, temلكلature, shading, soiling, etc. Typical range 10-20% لكل NREL.

degradationrate.label: Annual Degradation المعدل
degradationrate.helper: Typical 0.5-1% لكل year لكل manufacturer warranty. Based on IEC 61215.

systemcost.label: Total System التكلفة
systemcost.helper: Total installed التكلفة after incentives. المستخدم for ROI calculation.

inverterefficiency.label: Inverter Efficiency

tiltangle.label: Tilt Angle

azimuthangle.label: Azimuth Angle

ambienttemperature.label: Average Ambient Temلكلature
ambienttemperature.helper: Average daytime temلكلature during peak Sun الساعات.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level
dataconfidence.helper: Adjusts output for uncertainty. Low = 0.8, Medium = 1.0, High = 1.1 multiplier.

surfacearea.label: Surface المساحة
surfacearea.helper: Total Surface المساحة of the object/pipe exposed to ambient. Based on ISO 12241:2008 for thermal insulation.

surfacetemperature.label: Surface Temلكلature
surfacetemperature.helper: Temلكلature of the outer surface of the insulation or object. Required for convective and radiative فقد الحرارة calculation.

ambienttemperature.label: Ambient Temلكلature
ambienttemperature.helper: Temلكلature of surrounding air. Standard ambient conditions لكل ISO 6946.

windspeed.label: Wind Speed
windspeed.helper: Air velocity over surface. Affects convective heat transfer coefficient. Based on ASHRAE Handbook.

emissivity.label: Emissivity
emissivity.helper: Surface emissivity for radiative heat transfer. Typical القيمةs: oxidized steel 0.8, polished metal 0.1. Based on ASTM C1371.

insulationthickness.label: Insulation السماكة
insulationthickness.helper: السماكة of insulation layer. المستخدم to compute thermal resistance. Based on ISO 12241.

insulationconductivity.label: Insulation Thermal Conductivity
insulationconductivity.helper: Thermal conductivity of insulation المادة. Typical: mineral wool 0.04, polyurethane 0.025. Based on ASTM C518.

operationhours.label: Oلكلation الساعات لكل Year
operationhours.helper: Annual oلكلating الساعات. المستخدم to calculate annual الطاقة loss. Standard industrial assumption.

energycost.label: الطاقة التكلفة
energycost.helper: التكلفة of الطاقة لكل kWh. المستخدم to calculate financial loss. Based on local utility المعدلs.

fueltype.label: الوقود Type
fueltype.helper: الوقود type deالمدةines heating القيمة And combustion characteristics. Based on ASME PTC 4 and ISO 50001.

fuelconsumption.label: الوقود الاستهلاك
fuelconsumption.helper: Mass or الحجمtric التدفق المعدل of الوقود input. Essential for الطاقة balance.

fuelheatingvalue.label: الوقود Heating القيمة (HHV)
fuelheatingvalue.helper: Higher Heating القيمة of الوقود. Standard test methods ASTM D240 for liquids, ASTM D5865 for solids.

steamflow.label: Steam التدفق المعدل
steamflow.helper: Mass التدفق المعدل of steam produced. Key output parameter.

steamenthalpy.label: Steam Enthalpy
steamenthalpy.helper: Enthalpy of steam at oلكلating الضغط and temلكلature. From steam tables لكل ASME.

feedwaterenthalpy.label: Feedwater Enthalpy
feedwaterenthalpy.helper: Enthalpy of feedwater entering boiler. Typically at deaerator outlet temلكلature.

excessair.label: Excess Air لكلcentage
excessair.helper: Excess air المستخدم for combustion. Affects flue gas losses. Typical range 10-50%.

fluegastemperature.label: Flue Gas Exit Temلكلature
fluegastemperature.helper: Temلكلature of flue gases leaving boiler. Higher temلكلature increases losses.

ambienttemperature.label: Ambient Temلكلature
ambienttemperature.helper: Reference ambient temلكلature for فقد الحرارة calculations.

radiationloss.label: Radiation and Convection Loss
radiationloss.helper: فقد الحرارة from boiler surface. Typically 1-3% of input الطاقة.

blowdownrate.label: Blowdown المعدل
blowdownrate.helper: لكلcentage of boiler water discharged to control solids. Affects efficiency.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level
dataconfidence.helper: User's confidence in input data accuracy. Adjusts output reliability.

compressorpower.label: Compressor القدرة
compressorpower.helper: Nominal القدرة rating of the compressor motor. Based on ISO 1217 standard for compressor الأداء testing.

loadfactor.label: معامل الحمل
loadfactor.helper: لكلcentage of time the compressor opeالمعدلs at full load. Typical القيمةs from compressed air system audits (ISO 11011).

operatinghoursperday.label: Oلكلating الساعات لكل Day
operatinghoursperday.helper: Daily oلكلating الساعات. Based on shift patterns and production schedules.

operatingdaysperyear.label: Oلكلating الأيام لكل Year
operatingdaysperyear.helper: Annual oلكلating الأيام. Typical for industrial facilities.

electricitycost.label: Electricity التكلفة
electricitycost.helper: Average electricity السعر. Based on local utility المعدلs or EIA data.

motorefficiency.label: Motor Efficiency
motorefficiency.helper: Efficiency of the electric motor. Based on NEMA MG1 or IEC 60034 standards.

compressortype.label: Compressor Type
compressortype.helper: Type of compressor affects maintenance and efficiency factors. Based on ISO 5390 classification.

maintenancefactor.label: Maintenance Factor
maintenancefactor.helper: Additional الطاقة loss due to poor maintenance (e.g., leaks, dirty filters). Based on DOE compressed air guidelines.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level in input data accuracy. المستخدم for risk-adjusted outputs.

sector.label: Sector
sector.helper: CBAM sectors as defined in EU Regulation 2023/956. Select the sector of the product.

productionvolume.label: Annual Production الحجم
productionvolume.helper: Total annual production الحجم of the product in tonnes. Required for calculating embedded emissions.

embeddedemissionsperton.label: Embedded Emissions لكل Tonne
embeddedemissionsperton.helper: Direct and indirect greenhouse gas emissions embedded in one tonne of product, measured in tonnes of CO2 equivalent. Based on ISO 14064 and GHG Protocol.

carbonpriceorigin.label: سعر الكربون in Origin Country

carbonpriceorigin.helper: التيار سعر الكربون applicable in the country of origin. If no سعر الكربون, enter 0. Based on World Bank Carbon Pricing Dashboard.

cbamcertificateprice.label: CBAM Certificate السعر (EU ETS)
cbamcertificateprice.helper: التيار السعر of CBAM certificates, linked to EU ETS allowance السعر. Source: European الطاقة Exchange (EEX).

freeallowancefactor.label: Free Allowance Factor
freeallowancefactor.helper: لكلcentage of emissions covered by free allowances during the transitional لكلiod. Default 0% for full exposure. Based on CBAM regulation.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level in the input data. Low: estimated, Medium: industry average, High: verified. Affects confidence adjustment.

distance.label: المسافة Traveled
distance.helper: Total المسافة traveled by the vehicle. Based on standard odometer readings.

fuelused.label: الوقود المستخدم
fuelused.helper: الحجم of الوقود consumed during the trip. Measured at pump.

fueltype.label: الوقود Type
fueltype.helper: Type of الوقود المستخدم. Affects الطاقة الكثافة and CO2 emission factors. Reference: ISO 14064.

vehicletype.label: Vehicle Type
vehicletype.helper: Vehicle category for benchmarking. Reference: EPA الوقود economy standards.

drivingcondition.label: Driving Condition
drivingcondition.helper: Driving pattern affects الوقود efficiency. City driving has lower efficiency due to stops.

loadfactor.label: معامل الحمل
loadfactor.helper: لكلcentage of maximum load capacity. Higher load increases الوقود الاستهلاك. Reference: ISO 50001.

maintenancescore.label: Maintenance Score
maintenancescore.helper: Vehicle maintenance condition (0=poor, 100=excellent). Poor maintenance increases الوقود use. Reference: Lean TPM.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence in input data accuracy. المستخدم to adjust output reliability.

fuelprice.label: الوقود السعر لكل unit
fuelprice.helper: التيار market السعر لكل liter or kWh. Source: local الوقود السعر indices.

fueltype.label: الوقود Type
fueltype.helper: الوقود type deالمدةines الطاقة الكثافة and التكلفة لكل unit. Based on standard الوقود classifications (ASTM D975 for diesel, ASTM D4814 for gasoline).

fuelconsumption.label: الوقود الاستهلاك
fuelconsumption.helper: Average الوقود الاستهلاك لكل 100 km. For electric vehicles, use kWh/100km. Based on EPA الوقود economy testing procedures.

distance.label: المسافة Traveled
distance.helper: Total المسافة traveled in the لكلiod. المستخدم to calculate total الوقود المستخدم.

currency.label: Currency
currency.helper: Currency for التكلفة output. ISO 4217 currency codes.

period.label: لكلiod
period.helper: Time لكلiod for التكلفة calculation. المستخدم to scale المسافة if needed (e.g., monthly المسافة).

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence in input data accuracy. Affects adjusted output. Based on data quality assessment (ISO 8000).

length.label: الطول
length.helper: Physical dimension of the package. المستخدم to calculate الحجمtric الوزن. Standard: ISO 6780.

width.label: العرض
width.helper: Physical dimension of the package. المستخدم to calculate الحجمtric الوزن. Standard: ISO 6780.

height.label: الارتفاع
height.helper: Physical dimension of the package. المستخدم to calculate الحجمtric الوزن. Standard: ISO 6780.

weight.label: Actual الوزن
weight.helper: Actual الوزن of the package. المستخدم to compare with الحجمtric الوزن for chargeable الوزن deالمدةination.

dimfactor.label: Dimensional Factor
dimfactor.helper: Conversion factor المستخدم by carriers (e.g., 5000 for air freight, 6000 for road). Standard: IATA for air, CEN for road.

mode.label: النقل Mode
mode.helper: النقل mode affects the dimensional factor and التكلفة structure. Standard: IATA for air, CEN for road.

sortorder.helper: Order to sort data before finding median. Ascending is standard.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level in data accuracy. المستخدم for adjusted median calculation.

currentassets.label: التيار Assets
currentassets.helper: Total التيار assets from balance sheet. Standard financial ratio input.

currentliabilities.label: التيار Liabilities
currentliabilities.helper: Total التيار liabilities from balance sheet. Standard financial ratio input.

inventory.label: Inventory
inventory.helper: Inventory القيمة from balance sheet. المستخدم for quick ratio.

totaldebt.label: Total Debt
totaldebt.helper: Total debt (short-المدة + long-المدة) from balance sheet.

totalequity.label: Total Equity
totalequity.helper: Total shareholders' equity from balance sheet.

accountsreceivable.label: Accounts Receivable
accountsreceivable.helper: Total accounts receivable from balance sheet.

accountspayable.label: Accounts Payable
accountspayable.helper: Total accounts payable from balance sheet.

operatingexpenses.label: Oلكلating Expenses
operatingexpenses.helper: Total oلكلating expenses from income statement.

ebitda.label: EBITDA
ebitda.helper: Earnings before interest, taxes, depreciation, amortization.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: User's confidence in input data quality. Adjusts output reliability.

numerator.label: Numerator (Part)
numerator.helper: The part القيمة in a proportion calculation. المستخدم in ratio analysis (e.g., defect count, التكلفة component). Based on general mathematical proportion principles.

denominator.label: Denominator (Whole)
denominator.helper: The whole القيمة in a proportion calculation. Must be positive to avoid division by zero. المستخدم in ratio analysis (e.g., total production, Total التكلفة).

scalefactor.label: Scale Factor (e.g., لكل 100)
scalefactor.helper: Multiplier to express proportion as a لكلcentage (scale=100) or لكل mille (scale=1000). Default 1 gives raw ratio. Common in quality metrics (defects لكل million opportunities).

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level
dataconfidence.helper: Subjective confidence in input data quality. المستخدم to adjust output reliability. Based on data quality management principles (ISO 8000).

eventaprobability.label: Probability of Event A
eventaprobability.helper: Base probability of event A occurring. المستخدم in basic probability calculations. Referenced from probability theory fundamentals.

eventbprobability.label: Probability of Event B
eventbprobability.helper: Base probability of event B occurring. المستخدم in joint and conditional probability calculations.

conditionalprobability.label: Conditional Probability P(B|A)
conditionalprobability.helper: Probability of B given A. Required for Bayes' theorem and conditional probability analysis.

calculationmode.label: Calculation Mode
calculationmode.helper: Select the type of probability calculation: joint (P(A∩B)), conditional (P(A|B)), Bayes (P(A|B) from P(B|A)), complement (P(not A)), union (P(A∪B)).

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level in input data (0 to 1). المستخدم to adjust output for uncertainty. Typical القيمةs: 0.9, 0.95, 0.99.

populationsize.label: Population Size
populationsize.helper: Total number of items or individuals in the population. Required for finite population correction. Based on statistical sampling standards (ISO 2859, ANSI/ASQ Z1.4).

confidencelevel.label: Confidence Level
confidencelevel.helper: Desired probability that the sample accuالمعدلly represents the population. Common choices: 90%, 95%, 99%. Based on Six Sigma and hypothesis testing standards.

marginoferror.label: Margin of Error
marginoferror.helper: Maximum acceptable الفرق between sample statistic and population parameter. Typically 5% for general surveys. Based on survey methodology (Cochran, 1977).

expectedproportion.label: Expected Proportion
expectedproportion.helper: Anticipated proportion of the population with the attribute of interest. Use 50% for maximum variability. Based on sample size formulas (Cochran, 1977).

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence in the input data quality (e.g., from historical data). Adjusts final sample size upward if data confidence is low. Based on risk management practices.

value.label: الطول القيمة
value.helper: Input الطول القيمة to be converted. Based on SI standard (ISO 80000-3).

fromunit.label: من الوحدة
fromunit.helper: Source unit of الطول. Supports SI and imلكلial units لكل ISO 80000-3 and ASTM E380.

tounit.label: To Unit
tounit.helper: الهدف unit of الطول. Supports SI and imلكلial units لكل ISO 80000-3 and ASTM E380.

value.label: القيمة
value.helper: The numeric القيمة of the المساحة to be converted. Based on SI unit standard (ISO 80000-3).

fromunit.label: من الوحدة
fromunit.helper: The unit of the input المساحة. Common units based on international standards (ISO 80000-3) and US customary units.

tounit.label: To Unit
tounit.helper: The الهدف unit for conversion. Same standards as fromUnit.

powerfactor.label: Güç Faktörü (cos φ)
powerfactor.helper: AC devrelerde aktif gücün görünür güce oranı. IEEE 1459 standardına göre tanımlanır. Endüstriyel tesislerde tipik 0.8-0.95 arası.

current.label: Akım (Amلكل)
current.helper: Elektrik akımı değeri, amلكلmetre ile ölçülür. IEC 60038 standardına göre nominal akım değerleri.

voltage.label: Gerilim (Volt)
voltage.helper: Faz-nötr veya faz-faz gerilimi. IEC 60038 standart gerilim seviyeleri (230V, 400V, 690V vb.).

phasetype.label: Faz Türü
phasetype.helper: Tek faz veya üç faz sistemi. IEC 60364 tesisat standardına göre seçim.

efficiency.label: Verim (%)
efficiency.helper: Motor, jeneratör veya dönüştürücü verimi. IEC 60034-2 motor verim standardı.

odahacmi.label: Oda Hacmi (m³)
odahacmi.helper: Odanın genişlik, uzunluk ve yükseklik çarpımı. Standart: ASHRAE Handbook - HVAC Systems and Equipment.

kisisayisi.label: Kişi Sayısı
kisisayisi.helper: Odada bulunan ortalama kişi sayısı. Her kişi yaklaşık 100-150 W ısı yükü ekler. Kaynak: ASHRAE.

pencerealani.label: Pencere Alanı (m²)
pencerealani.helper: Güneş ışınımından kaynaklı ısı kazancı için. Standart: ASHRAE Solar Heat Gain Coefficients.

pencereyonu.label: Pencere Yönü
pencereyonu.helper: Güneş ışınımı faktörü yöne göre değişir. Kaynak: ASHRAE.

yalitimseviyesi.label: Yalıtım Seviyesi
yalitimseviyesi.helper: Binanın yalıtım kalitesi. Zayıf: yüksek ısı transferi, İyi: düşük. Standart: TS 825 (Türkiye) veya ISO 6946.

cihazgucu.label: Elektrikli Cihaz Gücü (W)
cihazgucu.helper: Odadaki bilgisayar, TV vb. cihazların toplam gücü. Kaynak: ASHRAE.

aydinlatmagucu.label: Aydınlatma Gücü (W)
aydinlatmagucu.helper: Aydınlatma armatürlerinin toplam gücü. Kaynak: ASHRAE.

dataconfidence.label: Veri Güveni (0-1)
dataconfidence.helper: Girdi verilerinin güvenilirliği. 1: yüksek güven, 0: düşük. Premium özellikler için kullanılır.

civatacapi.label: Cıvata Çapı (mm)
civatacapi.helper: Cıvatanın nominal çapı. ISO 898-1 standardına göre mekanik özellikler çapa bağlıdır.

adim.label: Adım (mm)
adim.helper: Diş adımı. Metrik dişler için standart değerler ISO 261'e göre belirlenir.

surtunmekatsayisi.label: Sürtünme Katsayısı
surtunmekatsayisi.helper: Diş ve oturma yüzeyi sürtünme katsayısı. VDI 2230 standardına göre tipik değerler 0.08-0.20 arasıdır.

onyuklemekuvveti.label: Ön Yükleme Kuvveti (kN)
onyuklemekuvveti.helper: Cıvataya uygulanması istenen eksenel ön yükleme kuvveti. Tasarım gereksinimine göre belirlenir.

malzemesinifi.label: Malzeme Sınıfı
malzemesinifi.helper: Cıvata malzeme sınıfı. ISO 898-1'e göre mekanik özellikleri belirler. Akma dayanımı ve çekme dayanımı sınıfa bağlıdır.

yaglamali.label: Yağlamalı Montaj
yaglamali.helper: Montaj sırasında yağlama yapılıp yapılmadığı. Yağlama sürtünme katsayısını düşürür ve tork değerini etkiler.

vehicletype.label: Araç Türü
vehicletype.helper: Türkiye'de MTV hesaplamasında araç türü belirleyicidir. 197 sayılı Motorlu Taşıtlar Vergisi Kanunu'na göre sınıflandırma yapılır.

enginedisplacement.label: Motor Silindir Hacmi (cm³)
enginedisplacement.helper: Motor hacmi MTV dilimlerini belirler. 197 sayılı Kanun'da yer alan tarifeye göre 1300, 1600, 1800, 2000, 2500, 3000, 4000 cm³ eşik değerleri kullanılır.

vehicleage.label: Araç Yaşı (yıl)
vehicleage.helper: Araç yaşı arttıkça MTV oranı düşer. Kanun'da 1-3, 4-6, 7-11, 12-15, 16+ yaş dilimleri tanımlanmıştır.

ishybridorelectric.label: Hibrit/Elektrikli Araç
ishybridorelectric.helper: Elektrikli ve bazı hibrit araçlar için MTV indirimi veya muafiyeti uygulanır. 197 sayılı Kanun ve çevre dostu araç teşvikleri kapsamında değerlendirilir.

taxyear.label: Vergi Yılı
taxyear.helper: Her yıl yeniden değerleme oranında güncellenen MTV tutarları için yıl bilgisi gereklidir. Hazine ve Maliye Bakanlığı tarafından yayımlanan tarifeler kullanılır.

value.label: Basınç Değeri
value.helper: Kullanıcının dönüştürmek istediği basınç değeri. Endüstriyel uygulamalarda yaygın olarak kullanılan birimlerden biridir. ISO 80000-4:2006 standardına dayanır.

fromunit.label: Kaynak Birim
fromunit.helper: Dönüştürülecek basınç birimi. Mühendislikte yaygın kullanılan birimler: bar (metrik), psi (İngiliz sistemi), pascal (SI).

horsepower.label: Beygir Gücü (HP)
horsepower.helper: Güç değeri, genellikle motor veya türbin gibi makinelerin لكلformansını ifade eder. Endüstriyel standartlarda (ISO 80000-4) kullanılır.

horsepowertype.label: Beygir Gücü Türü
horsepowertype.helper: Farklı tanımlar (mekanik, metrik, elektrik, kazan) farklı dönüşüm katsayıları gerektirir. ISO 80000-4 ve IEEE standartlarına dayanır.

profiltipi.label: Profil Tipi
profiltipi.helper: NPU ve NPI profilleri farklı geometrik özelliklere sahiptir. Standart: DIN 1026-1 (NPU) ve DIN 1026-2 (NPI).

profilboyutu.label: Profil Boyutu (mm)
profilboyutu.helper: Profilin nominal yüksekliği (h). Standart boyutlar DIN 1026'ya göre belirlenmiştir.

profilkalitesi.label: Profil Kalitesi (Çelik Sınıfı)
profilkalitesi.helper: Çelik sınıfı, yoğunluğu ve mekanik özellikleri etkiler. Standart: EN 10025-2.

profiluzunlugu.label: Profil Uzunluğu (m)
profiluzunlugu.helper: Standart profil boyu genellikle 6 m veya 12 m'dir. Müşteri talebine göre değişebilir.

dataconfidence.label: Veri Güvenilirliği
dataconfidence.helper: Kullanılan verilerin güvenilirlik seviyesi. Düşük güvenilirlikte sonuçlar bir güvenlik faktörü ile çarpılır.

length.label: Boy (m)
length.helper: Profilin metre cinsinden boyu. Standart boylar genellikle 6 m veya 12 m'dir.

profiletype.label: Profil Tipi
profiletype.helper: Köşebent lama profilleri genellikle eşit veya eşit olmayan kollu olarak üretilir. TS 914 EN 10056-1 standardına göre sınıflandırılır.

widtha.label: Genişlik A (mm)
widtha.helper: Köşebentin birinci kenar genişliği. TS 914 EN 10056-1'e göre standart ölçüler 20-250 mm arasındadır.

widthb.label: Genişlik B (mm)
widthb.helper: Köşebentin ikinci kenar genişliği. Eşit kollu profillerde العرضA ile aynı, eşit olmayan kolluda farklı olabilir.

thickness.label: Et Kalınlığı (mm)
thickness.helper: Köşebent lama et kalınlığı. TS 914 EN 10056-1'e göre 3-25 mm arası standart kalınlıklar.

materialdensity.label: Malzeme Yoğunluğu (kg/m³)
materialdensity.helper: Çelik için tipik yoğunluk 7850 kg/m³. Paslanmaz çelik veya alüminyum gibi farklı malzemeler için değişir. ISO 630-1 referans alınır.

quantity.label: Adet
quantity.helper: Hesaplanacak profil adedi. Toplam ağırlık için adet ile çarpılır.

discap.label: Dış Çap (mm)
discap.helper: Boru dış çapı, standart boru boyutlarına göre (ISO 4200, ASTM A53) belirlenir.

etkal.label: Et Kalınlığı (mm)
etkal.helper: Boru cidar kalınlığı, basınç sınıfına ve standarda (ASME B36.10, EN 10255) göre seçilir.

boy.label: Boru Boyu (m)
boy.helper: Standart boru boyları genellikle 6 m veya 12 m'dir (ISO 4200).

malzeme.label: Malzeme Türü
malzeme.helper: Çelik (yoğunluk 7850 kg/m³) veya paslanmaz çelik (yoğunluk 7930 kg/m³) seçimi, ağırlık hesaplamasında kullanılır.

powerkw.label: Güç (kW)
powerkw.helper: Motor gücü kilowatt cinsinden. ISO 80000-4 standardına göre SI birimi.

powerhp.label: Güç (HP)
powerhp.helper: Motor gücü beygir gücü cinsinden. Metrik HP (PS) kullanılır; 1 HP = 0.7355 kW (metrik).

conversiontype.label: Dönüşüm Yönü
conversiontype.helper: Dönüşüm yönü seçimi: kW'tan HP'ye veya HP'den kW'a.

toplamgucihtiyaci.label: Toplam Güç İhtiyacı (kVA)
toplamgucihtiyaci.helper: Toplam yükün başlangıç ve çalışma anındaki güç ihtiyacı. ISO 8528 standardına göre jeneratör kapasitesi belirlenir.

yedeklilikfaktoru.label: Yedeklilik Faktörü
yedeklilikfaktoru.helper: Kritik yükler için yedek kapasite oranı. Genellikle 1.1-1.3 arası, kritik tesislerde 1.5-2.0.

calismasuresigunluk.label: Günlük Çalışma Süresi (saat)
calismasuresigunluk.helper: Jeneratörün günlük ortalama çalışma süresi. Sürekli çalışma için 24 saat.

calismagunuaylik.label: Aylık Çalışma Günü
calismagunuaylik.helper: Aylık ortalama çalışma günü sayısı. Vardiya düzenine göre değişir.

yakittuketimorani.label: Yakıt Tüketim Oranı (L/kWh)
yakittuketimorani.helper: Jeneratörün ürettiği her kWh başına tükettiği yakıt miktarı. Dizel jeneratörlerde tipik 0.2-0.4 L/kWh.

yakitfiyati.label: Yakıt Fiyatı (TL/L)
yakitfiyati.helper: Güncel yakıt fiyatı. EPDK verileri baz alınabilir.

jeneratortipi.label: Jeneratör Tipi
jeneratortipi.helper: Jeneratörün yakıt türü. Dizel en yaygın, gaz daha temiz, benzin daha az verimli.

bakimmaliyetiyillik.label: Yıllık Bakım Maliyeti (TL)
bakimmaliyetiyillik.helper: Jeneratörün yıllık لكلiyodik bakım maliyeti. Üretici önerileri ve işletme koşullarına göre değişir.

yatirimmaliyeti.label: Yatırım Maliyeti (TL)
yatirimmaliyeti.helper: Jeneratörün satın alma ve kurulum maliyeti. Piyasa araştırması ile belirlenir.

ekonomikomur.label: Ekonomik Ömür (yıl)
ekonomikomur.helper: Jeneratörün ekonomik ömrü. Genellikle 10-20 yıl arası.

iskontoorani.label: İskonto Oranı (%)
iskontoorani.helper: Sermaye maliyeti veya alternatif yatırım getirisi. Finansal analizlerde kullanılır.

dataconfidence.label: Veri Güveni
dataconfidence.helper: Girdi verilerinin güvenilirlik seviyesi. Düşük ise sonuçlar daha muhafazakar hesaplanır.

akim.label: Akım (A)
akim.helper: Devreden geçen akım değeri. IEC 60364 standardına göre kablo kesiti seçiminde temel parametre.

gerilim.label: Gerilim (V)
gerilim.helper: Sistem gerilimi. Alçak gerilim (230/400V) veya orta gerilim için kullanılır.

kablouzunlugu.label: Kablo Uzunluğu (m)
kablouzunlugu.helper: Kablo mesafesi. Gerilim düşümü hesabı için gereklidir.

kablotipi.label: Kablo Tipi
kablotipi.helper: Yalıtım malzemesi. IEC 60502 standardına göre farklı sıcaklık dayanımları.

tesisatsekli.label: Tesisat Şekli
tesisatsekli.helper: Kablo döşeme şekli. Isı dağılımını etkiler, IEC 60364-5-52.

ortamsicakligi.label: Ortam Sıcaklığı (°C)
ortamsicakligi.helper: Ortam sıcaklığı. Kablo taşıma kapasitesini düzeltmek için kullanılır.

izinligerilimdusumu.label: İzinli Gerilim Düşümü (%)
izinligerilimdusumu.helper: Maksimum izin verilen gerilim düşümü. IEC 60364 standardına göre genelde %3-5.
