machinedepreciationperhour.helper: Hourly depreciation التكلفة of printing equipment. Capital التكلفة allocation.

energycostperkwh.label: الطاقة التكلفة لكل kWh
energycostperkwh.helper: Electricity التكلفة لكل kilowatt-hour. ISO 50001 الطاقة management.

powerconsumptionkw.label: القدرة الاستهلاك (kW)
powerconsumptionkw.helper: Average القدرة draw of the printer during oلكلation. الطاقة efficiency metric.

maintenancecostperhour.label: Maintenance التكلفة لكل Hour
maintenancecostperhour.helper: Hourly maintenance التكلفة including parts and service. Total productive maintenance (TPM) consideration.

overheadrate.label: Overhead المعدل
overheadrate.helper: لكلcentage of direct التكلفةs allocated to overhead. Standard التكلفة accounting.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level in input data accuracy. Affects risk adjustment.

sellingprice.label: Selling السعر لكل unit
sellingprice.helper: Revenue لكل unit sold. Standard pricing input for margin analysis.

unitcost.label: Unit التكلفة (COGS)
unitcost.helper: التكلفة of goods sold لكل unit, including المادةs, labor, and overhead. Based on standard التكلفة accounting.

volume.label: Sales الحجم (units لكل لكلiod)
volume.helper: Number of units sold in the given لكلiod. المستخدم to calculate total margin.

period.label: لكلiod
period.helper: Time لكلiod for الحجم and margin calculation. Standard financial reporting لكلiods.

fixedcosts.label: Fixed التكلفةs (لكل لكلiod)
fixedcosts.helper: Fixed overhead التكلفةs allocated to the product. Based on absorption التكلفةing principles.

variablecosts.label: Variable التكلفةs (لكل unit)
variablecosts.helper: Variable التكلفةs لكل unit beyond COGS, e.g., shipping, commissions. Standard التكلفة accounting.

discountrate.label: Discount المعدل (%)
discountrate.helper: Average discount or promotion applied to Selling السعر. Common in retail and B2B pricing.

returnrate.label: Return المعدل (%)
returnrate.helper: لكلcentage of units returned. Impacts صافي revenue and التكلفة. Based on quality and customer satisfaction metrics.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level
dataconfidence.helper: Subjective confidence in input data accuracy. المستخدم for adjusted margin calculation. Common in decision analysis.

projectduration.label: Project المدة (months)
projectduration.helper: Standard project timeline; typical range 1-120 months based on PMI guidelines.

teamsize.label: Team Size (FTE)
teamsize.helper: Full-time equivalent staff; common in resource planning لكل PMBOK.

avghourlyrate.label: Average Hourly المعدل ($)
avghourlyrate.helper: الوزنed average labor التكلفة; industry benchmarks from BLS or internal data.

hoursperweekperfte.label: الساعات لكل Week لكل FTE
hoursperweekperfte.placeholder: أدخل الساعات لكل Week لكل FTE
hoursperweekperfte.helper: Standard workweek; 40 الساعات typical, overtime possible up to 80.

weekspermonth.label: Weeks لكل Month
weekspermonth.helper: Average weeks لكل month (52/12 ≈ 4.33); المستخدم for monthly التكلفة calculation.

materialcost.label: المادة التكلفة ($)
materialcost.helper: Direct المادة expenses; includes raw المادةs, components, supplies.

equipmentcost.label: Equipment التكلفة ($)
equipmentcost.helper: Capital equipment or إيجارal التكلفةs; depreciation may be considered.

overheadrate.label: Overhead المعدل (%)
overheadrate.helper: Indirect التكلفة allocation; typical range 10-50% based on industry (e.g., construction, IT).

contingencyrate.label: Contingency المعدل (%)
contingencyrate.helper: Risk buffer; recommended 5-20% لكل PMI risk management.

profitmargin.label: Profit Margin (%)
profitmargin.helper: الهدف profit; varies by industry (e.g., 10-20% typical).

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level
dataconfidence.helper: Subjective confidence in input data; affects adjusted التكلفة (low=+20%, medium=0%, high=-10%).

hammaddemaliyeti.label: Hammadde Maliyeti (birim başına)
hammaddemaliyeti.helper: Reçetedeki ana hammaddenin birim maliyeti. ISO 9001 maliyet yöصافيimi prensipleri esas alınır.

alternatifhammaddemaliyeti.label: Alternatif Hammadde Maliyeti (birim başına)
alternatifhammaddemaliyeti.helper: Alternatif hammaddenin birim maliyeti. Tedarikçi teklifleri veya piyasa araştırması ile belirlenir.

kullanimmiktari.label: Kullanım Miktarı (birim ürün başına)
kullanimmiktari.helper: Reçetede belirtilen hammadde miktarı. Ürün spesifikasyonlarına dayanır.

uretimadedi.label: Üretim Adedi (dönemlik)
uretimadedi.helper: Belirli bir dönemde (aylık/yıllık) üretilen ürün sayısı. Üretim planından alınır.

alternatifverimorani.label: Alternatif Hammadde Verim Oranı
alternatifverimorani.helper: Alternatif hammaddenin mevcut hammaddeye göre verimlilik oranı. Proses denemeleri ile belirlenir.

kalitekaybiorani.label: Kalite Kaybı Oranı (alternatif)
kalitekaybiorani.helper: Alternatif hammadde kullanımında oluşan fire/red oranı. Six Sigma kalite metrikleri.

lojistikmaliyetfarki.label: Lojistik Maliyet Farkı (birim başına)
lojistikmaliyetfarki.helper: Alternatif hammaddenin taşıma, depolama gibi lojistik maliyetlerindeki fark. Tedarik zinciri maliyet analizi.

dataconfidence.label: Veri Güven Seviyesi
dataconfidence.helper: Girdi verilerinin güvenilirliği. Düşük ise sonuçlar daha temkinli yorumlanmalı.

totalarea.label: Total Renovation المساحة
totalarea.helper: Total المساحة to be renovated in أمتار مربعة. Based on industry standards for construction التكلفة estimation (e.g., RICS New Rules of Measurement).

unitcost.label: Unit التكلفة لكل م²
unitcost.helper: Average التكلفة لكل square meter for renovation, including المادةs and labor. Derived from local construction التكلفة databases (e.g., RSMeans).

laborcostpercentage.label: Labor التكلفة لكلcentage
laborcostpercentage.helper: لكلcentage of Total التكلفة allocated to labor. Typical range from industry benchmarks (e.g., 30-50% for renovation projects).

materialcostpercentage.label: المادة التكلفة لكلcentage
materialcostpercentage.helper: لكلcentage of Total التكلفة allocated to المادةs. Complement of labor and overhead لكلcentages.

overheadpercentage.label: Overhead لكلcentage
overheadpercentage.helper: لكلcentage for overhead التكلفةs (لكلmits, insurance, management). Based on typical construction overhead المعدلs.

contingencypercentage.label: Contingency لكلcentage
contingencypercentage.helper: Contingency reserve for unforeseen التكلفةs. Recommended 10-20% لكل project management standards (PMBOK).

projectdurationmonths.label: Project المدة
projectdurationmonths.helper: Expected المدة of renovation project in months. Affects financing التكلفةs and escalation.

inflationrate.label: Annual Inflation المعدل
inflationrate.helper: Expected annual Inflation المعدل for construction التكلفةs. Based on economic forecasts (e.g., World Bank).

financingrate.label: Annual Financing المعدل
financingrate.helper: Annual interest المعدل for project financing. Based on التيار market المعدلs (e.g., LIBOR + spread).

energysavingsperyear.label: Annual الطاقة Savings
energysavingsperyear.helper: Expected annual الطاقة التكلفة savings after renovation. Based on الطاقة audit (ISO 50001).

maintenancesavingsperyear.label: Annual Maintenance Savings
maintenancesavingsperyear.helper: Expected annual maintenance التكلفة savings after renovation. Based on historical data.

propertyvalueincrease.label: Proلكلty القيمة Increase
propertyvalueincrease.helper: Expected increase in proلكلty القيمة After renovation. Based on real estate appraisal standards.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level of input data. Affects risk adjustment. Low = 0.8, Medium = 0.9, High = 1.0 multiplier.

repairtimehours.label: Repair Time (الساعات)
repairtimehours.helper: Actual or estimated repair المدة. Based on industrial engineering time studies (Maynard) and maintenance benchmarks.

hourlylaborcost.label: Hourly Labor التكلفة ($/hour)
hourlylaborcost.helper: Fully burdened Labor المعدل including overhead. Standard التكلفة accounting practice.

partscost.label: Parts التكلفة ($)
partscost.helper: التكلفة of replacement parts. Procurement data.

downtimecostperhour.label: Downtime التكلفة لكل Hour ($/hour)
downtimecostperhour.helper: Lost revenue or production التكلفة لكل hour of downtime. Based on throughput accounting.

repairmode.label: Repair Mode
repairmode.helper: Standard: normal shift; Emergency: overtime premium; Premium: expedited parts and labor. Lean/SMED classification.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence (0-1)
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence in input data accuracy. المستخدم for risk adjustment. ISO 9001 data quality.

ingredientcostperkg.label: İçerik Maliyeti (kg başına)
ingredientcostperkg.helper: Hammadde maliyeti, tabak maliyetinin ana bileşenidir. ISO 9001 kalite yöصافيimi kapsamında tedarikçi fiyatları dikkate alınır.

portionweight.label: Porsiyon Ağırlığı
portionweight.helper: Standart porsiyon büyüklüğü, menü mühendisliği prensiplerine göre belirlenir. Lean üretimde israfı önlemek için optimize edilir.

laborcostperhour.label: İşçilik Maliyeti (saat başına)
laborcostperhour.helper: Mutfak لكلsonelinin saatlik ücreti. Endüstri mühendisliğinde iş ölçümü ve zaman etüdü ile belirlenir.

preptimeperportion.label: Porsiyon Başına Hazırlık Süresi
preptimeperportion.helper: Bir porsiyonun hazırlanması için geçen süre. Maynard'ın iş etüdü prensiplerine dayanır.

overheadrate.label: Genel Gider Oranı
overheadrate.helper: Kira, elektrik, su gibi dolaylı maliyetlerin yüzdesi. Finansal analizde standart maliyet muhasebesi yöntemi.

wastepercentage.label: Fire Oranı
wastepercentage.helper: Üretim sırasında oluşan atık yüzdesi. Six Sigma'da israf azaltma hedefi.

desiredprofitmargin.label: Hedef Kar Marjı
desiredprofitmargin.helper: Restoranın hedeflediği kar oranı. Finansal oran analizinde kullanılır.

dataconfidence.label: Veri Güveni
dataconfidence.helper: Girdi verilerinin güvenilirlik seviyesi. Risk yöصافيiminde kullanılır.

roofarea.label: Roof المساحة
roofarea.helper: Total Roof المساحة to be covered. Standard measure in roofing industry (ASTM D6630).

materialcostpersquare.label: المادة التكلفة لكل Square
materialcostpersquare.helper: التكلفة of roofing المادة لكل square (100 sq ft). Industry standard unit (NRCA).

laborcostperhour.label: Labor التكلفة لكل Hour
laborcostperhour.helper: Hourly wage for roofing labor. Based on prevailing wage المعدلs (BLS).

laborhourspersquare.label: Labor الساعات لكل Square
laborhourspersquare.helper: Estimated Labor الساعات required لكل square. Industry benchmarks (RSMeans).

wastefactor.label: الهدر Factor
wastefactor.helper: لكلcentage of المادة الهدر due to cutting, overlap, etc. Typical range 5-15% (ASTM D6630).

overheadrate.label: Overhead المعدل
overheadrate.helper: Overhead as لكلcentage of direct التكلفةs (labor + المادة). Standard construction accounting (AIA).

profitmargin.label: Profit Margin
profitmargin.helper: Desired profit margin on Total التكلفة. Typical 15-25% (NRCA).

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level in input data. Adjusts final التكلفة for uncertainty (risk management).

channelname.label: Satış Kanalı Adı
channelname.helper: Karşılaştırma yapılacak satış kanalının seçimi. Endüstri standardı olarak kanal bazlı karlılık analizi yaygındır.

revenue.label: Toplam Gelir
revenue.helper: Kanal üzerinden elde edilen toplam satış geliri. Finansal tablolardan alınır.

costofgoodssold.label: Satılan Malın Maliyeti
costofgoodssold.helper: Ürünlerin maliyeti; hammadde, işçilik ve genel üretim giderlerini içerir. Muhasebe standardı.

marketingcost.label: Pazarlama Maliyeti
marketingcost.helper: Kanal için yapılan reklam, promosyon ve dijital pazarlama harcamaları.

salescost.label: Satış Maliyeti
salescost.helper: Satış ekibi maaşları, komisyonlar ve satışla ilgili diğer giderler.

logisticscost.label: Lojistik Maliyeti
logisticscost.helper: Nakliye, depolama ve dağıtım maliyetleri. Tedarik zinciri yöصافيimi standardı.

overheadcost.label: Genel Gider
overheadcost.helper: Kanal için tahsis edilen genel yöصافيim giderleri (kira, elektrik, vb.).

returnrate.label: İade Oranı
returnrate.helper: Satılan ürünlerin iade yüzdesi. İade maliyetleri karlılığı etkiler.

discountrate.label: İskonto Oranı
discountrate.helper: Kanalda uygulanan ortalama iskonto oranı. صافي geliri düşürür.

dataconfidence.label: Veri Güveni
dataconfidence.helper: Verilerin güvenilirlik yüzdesi. Düşükse sonuçlar düzeltilir.

revenue.label: Total Revenue
revenue.helper: Total sales revenue for the لكلiod. Based on standard financial reporting (GAAP/IFRS).

cogs.label: التكلفة of Goods Sold
cogs.helper: Direct التكلفةs attributable to production. Includes المادةs, labor, overhead. ISO 9001 التكلفة accounting guidelines.

operatingexpenses.label: Oلكلating Expenses
operatingexpenses.helper: SG&A, R&D, depreciation, etc. Excludes interest and taxes. Standard income statement classification.

otherincome.label: Other Income
otherincome.helper: Non-oلكلating income (e.g., interest, gains). Included for comprehensive margin calculation.

taxrate.label: Effective Tax المعدل
taxrate.helper: Effective corpoالمعدل tax المعدل. Based on jurisdiction and tax laws.

perioddays.label: لكلiod الطول (الأيام)
perioddays.helper: Number of الأيام in the reporting لكلiod. المستخدم for annualization if needed.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level
dataconfidence.helper: Subjective confidence in input data accuracy. Affects adjusted outputs. Based on data quality assessment (Six Sigma DMAIC).

annualdemand.label: Annual Demand (units)
annualdemand.helper: Annual demand for the product. المستخدم to calculate economic order الكمية and الإعداد التكلفة لكل unit. Based on EOQ model (Harris, 1913) and lean manufacturing principles.

setuptime.label: الإعداد Time (minutes)
setuptime.helper: Time required to change over from one product to another. Key metric in SMED (Shingo, 1985) to reduce الهدر and improve flexibility.

hourlycost.label: Hourly التكلفة of الإعداد Labor ($/hour)
hourlycost.placeholder: أدخل Hourly التكلفة of الإعداد Labor ($/hour)
hourlycost.helper: Labor التكلفة لكل hour for الإعداد activities. Includes wages, benefits, and overhead. المستخدم to calculate الإعداد التكلفة لكل الإعداد.

holdingcostperunit.label: Holding التكلفة لكل unit لكل Year ($)
holdingcostperunit.placeholder: أدخل Holding التكلفة لكل unit لكل Year ($)
holdingcostperunit.helper: التكلفة to hold one unit of inventory for one year. Includes storage, insurance, obsolescence, and opportunity التكلفة. Based on inventory carrying التكلفة standards (APICS).

productionrate.label: Production المعدل (units لكل hour)
productionrate.helper: Number of units produced لكل hour during production. المستخدم to calculate production time and economic production الكمية (EPQ) model.

workingdaysperyear.label: Working الأيام لكل Year
workingdaysperyear.helper: Number of working الأيام لكل year. المستخدم to convert annual demand to daily demand. Typical القيمة 250 (5 الأيام/week, 50 weeks).

hourspershift.label: الساعات لكل Shift
hourspershift.helper: Number of الساعات in a shift. المستخدم to calculate available production time لكل day.

shiftsperday.label: Shifts لكل Day
shiftsperday.helper: Number of shifts لكل day. Affects available production time.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence (0-1)
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level in input data accuracy. المستخدم to adjust output for uncertainty. 1 = high confidence, 0 = low confidence.

targetvalue.label: Hedef Değer (m)
targetvalue.helper: Taguchi kalite kayıp fonksiyonunda hedef değer, ürünün ideal لكلformansını temsil eder. ISO 9001:2015 kalite yöصافيim sistemleri standardına dayanır.

actualvalue.label: Gerçekleşen Değer (y)
actualvalue.helper: Üretim sürecinde ölçülen gerçek değer. Taguchi metodolojisinde hedeften sapma kalite kaybına neden olur.

tolerance.label: Tolerans (Δ)
tolerance.helper: Spesifikasyon limitlerinin yarısı (USL-LSL)/2. Mühendislik toleransı, ürünün kabul edilebilir sapma aralığını belirler.

lossattolerance.label: Tolerans Sınırındaki Kayıp (A₀)
lossattolerance.helper: Tolerans sınırında (spesifikasyon limitinde) oluşan kalite kaybının parasal değeri. Genellikle hurda, yeniden işleme veya müşteri memnuniyetsizliği maliyetlerine dayanır.

productionvolume.label: Üretim Miktarı
productionvolume.helper: Değerlendirilen dönemdeki toplam üretim adedi. Toplam kalite kaybını hesaplamak için kullanılır.

dataconfidence.label: Veri Güven Düzeyi
dataconfidence.helper: Girdi verilerinin güvenilirliğini ifade eder. Düşük güven durumunda sonuçlar daha muhafazakar hale getirilir.

setuptimecurrent.label: التيار الإعداد Time (minutes)
setuptimecurrent.helper: التيار time to change tool holder and fixture. Based on SMED methodology (Shingo, 1985).

numworkers.label: Number of Workers
numworkers.helper: Workers involved in الإعداد. Lean standard: single-minute exchange of die (SMED) aims for 1 worker.

hourlylaborcost.label: Hourly Labor التكلفة لكل Worker
hourlylaborcost.placeholder: أدخل Hourly Labor التكلفة لكل Worker
hourlylaborcost.helper: Average wage including overhead. Industry benchmark from BLS or local data.

numsetupsperday.label: Number of الإعدادs لكل Day
numsetupsperday.placeholder: أدخل Number of الإعدادs لكل Day
numsetupsperday.helper: Frequency of tool/fixture changes. Affects total daily downtime.

machinehourlycost.label: Machine Hourly التكلفة
machinehourlycost.helper: التكلفة of machine downtime including depreciation, الطاقة, maintenance. Based on standard Machine hour المعدل.

defectrateaftersetup.label: Defect المعدل After الإعداد
defectrateaftersetup.helper: لكلcentage of defective parts produced after الإعداد until process stabilizes. Quality metric لكل ISO 9001.

productionrateperhour.label: Production المعدل لكل Hour
productionrateperhour.helper: Number of parts produced لكل hour during stable production. المستخدم to calculate lost production due to defects.

partcost.label: التكلفة لكل part
partcost.helper: المادة and variable التكلفة لكل part. المستخدم to quantify defect التكلفة.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level
dataconfidence.helper: User's confidence in input data accuracy. Affects adjustment factor for outputs.

sectorFooter.tagline: حاسبات قطاعية لقرارات الإنتاج والصناعة وإدارة الأعمال.
sectorFooter.noteBody: الحاسبات للمراجعة الأولية ودعم القرار. تحقق من بياناتك قبل القرارات التجارية الحاسمة.

calculatorLibrary.metaDescription: موارد كتالوج الحاسبات العامة لـ SectorCalc: فهرس LLMs وقوائم الأدوات القطاعية ومداخل الكتالوج.
calculatorLibrary.title: مكتبة الحاسبات
calculatorLibrary.lead: فهارس قابلة للقراءة آلياً ومداخل كتالوج لحاسبات SectorCalc القطاعية.

inputGuide.title: دليل الإدخال
inputGuide.description: يوضح هذا المخطط أي قياس أو قيمة يقابل كل حقل إدخال.

standard.title: Usage agreement
standard.body: This calculation provides a preliminary assessment based on your inputs and deterministic methodology. Results do not replace quotes, investment, engineering, tax, legal, or safety decisions. For critical decisions, verify with your own data, qualified experts, and applicable regulations.

elevated.title: Important usage notice
elevated.body: This tool models commercial or compliance-sensitive exposure. Outputs are indicative only and must be validated against your contracts, payroll records, and local rules before action.

engineering.title: Engineering reference notice
engineering.body: This tool provides standard-referenced pre-calculation only. Final design, safety, and conformity decisions require authorized engineering review.

standards.selectorNote: Default follows region; you may switch reference systems for comparison.
standards.engineeringWarning: This tool provides standard-referenced pre-calculation only. Final design, safety, and conformity decisions require authorized engineering review.

calculationFeedback.prompt: See an error in this result?
calculationFeedback.success: Thank you — your note was queued for review.

error.submitFailed: Could not send feedback. Try again shortly.

meta.title: Developer showcase | SectorCalc
meta.description: Semantic reference for AI-readable SectorCalc calculator discovery.

developerShowcase.title: SectorCalc developer showcase
developerShowcase.intro: This page explains how SectorCalc tools expose structured inputs, outputs, and JSON-LD for AI agents. It is a public reference — not a private API endpoint.

semantic.title: JSON-LD structure
semantic.body: Calculator routes expose schema.org actions and software application metadata.
semantic.item3: تتضمن أدوات القرار المميزة بيانات وصفية لتقرير القرار عند الحاجة

resources.title: Public resources
resources.note: No secrets, admin routes, or entitlement bypass are exposed here.

index.title: SectorCalc Semantic Tool Index
index.body: Public calculator contracts, input/output parameters, and CalculateAction semantics are listed here automatically.
